A bouncing ball where it scales vertically while squashing horizontally on impact, the impact zone clips a radial burst-pattern expanding then contracting in rapid sequence, the ball's shadow stretches during flight and compresses on landing, a surrounding glow's stroke-width pulses to accentuate each bounce in a six-phase sequence, and opacity of secondary bounces fades in staggered rhythm creating diminishing bounce effect with trailing shadow distortion.

<svg width="300" height="300" viewBox="0 0 300 300">
  <defs>
    <filter id="ball-glow">
      <feGaussianBlur in="SourceGraphic" stdDeviation="2"/>
    </filter>
    <radialGradient id="burst-gradient">
      <stop offset="0%" style="stop-color:white;stop-opacity:0.8" />
      <stop offset="100%" style="stop-color:white;stop-opacity:0" />
    </radialGradient>
  </defs>
  <g transform="translate(150, 100)">
    <circle class="ball-shadow" cx="0" cy="100" r="30" fill="rgba(0,0,0,0.15)"/>
    <circle class="ball" cx="0" cy="0" r="20" fill="#3a7" filter="url(#ball-glow)"/>
    <g class="burst">
      <circle class="burst-line" cx="0" cy="0" r="5" fill="none" stroke="white" stroke-width="1" opacity="0.6"/>
      <circle class="burst-line" cx="0" cy="0" r="10" fill="none" stroke="white" stroke-width="1" opacity="0.4"/>
      <circle class="burst-line" cx="0" cy="0" r="15" fill="none" stroke="white" stroke-width="1" opacity="0.2"/>
    </g>
    <circle class="ball-glow-ring" cx="0" cy="0" r="25" fill="none" stroke="rgba(255,255,255,0.5)" stroke-width="2"/>
  </g>
</svg>

<style>
.ball {
  animation: bounce-ball 1.2s cubic-bezier(0.68, -0.55, 0.265, 1.55) infinite;
}

.ball-shadow {
  animation: shadow-stretch 1.2s ease-in-out infinite;
}

.burst {
  animation: burst-expand 1.2s ease-out infinite;
  opacity: 0;
}

.ball-glow-ring {
  animation: glow-pulse 1.2s ease-in-out infinite;
}

@keyframes bounce-ball {
  0% {
    transform: translateY(-80px) scaleY(1) scaleX(1);
  }
  50% {
    transform: translateY(0) scaleY(0.7) scaleX(1.3);
  }
  100% {
    transform: translateY(-80px) scaleY(1) scaleX(1);
  }
}

@keyframes shadow-stretch {
  0% {
    transform: scaleX(0.5) scaleY(1);
    filter: blur(2px);
  }
  50% {
    transform: scaleX(1.5) scaleY(0.3);
    filter: blur(3px);
  }
  100% {
    transform: scaleX(0.5) scaleY(1);
    filter: blur(2px);
  }
}

@keyframes burst-expand {
  0% {
    opacity: 0;
    transform: scale(0.5);
  }
  30% {
    opacity: 0.8;
    transform: scale(1);
  }
  100% {
    opacity: 0;
    transform: scale(1.5);
  }
}

@keyframes glow-pulse {
  0% {
    stroke-width: 2px;
    opacity: 0.5;
  }
  50% {
    stroke-width: 4px;
    opacity: 0.8;
  }
  100% {
    stroke-width: 2px;
    opacity: 0.5;
  }
}
</style>

<style>

A bouncing basketball scaling vertically while squashing horizontally on impact, the impact zone clips a radial burst-pattern expanding then contracting, the ball's shadow stretches during flight and compresses on landing, a surrounding glow's stroke-width pulses to accentuate each bounce, and secondary bounce opacity fades in staggered diminishing rhythm.

A concentric ripple effect where six circular clips expand and contract in rippling waves with staggered timing, each clip-path layer reveals layered background gradients shifting position diagonally beneath in parallax, the outermost clip's border-radius morphs from sharp to rounded, and a radial shadow expands concentrically creating tunnel-vision depth effect.

A pulsating biological membrane cycling border-radius from angular to bulbous while its stroke-dasharray animates as a chasing wave accelerating through four tempo phases, stroke-color shifts from pale cyan to vibrant magenta and back in staggered cycles, and the membrane's shadow inverts from cast-outward to cast-inward suggesting internal pressure and expansion-contraction tension.

A loading spinner with eight arcs where each arc's stroke-dasharray chases its perimeter at staggered intervals creating ripple effect, stroke-color ripples through indigo-cyan gradient offset by 50ms per arc, the arc's stroke-width scales responsively to rotation angle, and a central shadow pulses indicating processing intensity synchronized to arc rotation with staggered timing.

A geometric convergence where six hexagons translate inward toward center in staggered sequence, each hexagon's stroke-width scales as it approaches center fattening on arrival, stroke-color builds from muted gray to saturated vibrant as shapes converge, border-radius morphs from sharp to subtly rounded, and overlapping shadows darken suggesting layering compression depth.

A kaleidoscopic pinwheel where six triangular wedges rotate clockwise while scaling outward in staggered sequence, each wedge's stroke-width modulates rhythmically, stroke-color sequences through rainbow spectrum offset by 50ms per wedge, border-radius subtly rounds wedge vertices as they expand, and layered shadows at varying opacity suggest radial depth recession.

A double-helix DNA strand where two intertwined curves rotate 360 degrees while skewing and counter-skewing on alternating axes, each strand's stroke-width oscillates inversely creating braiding effect, stroke-dasharray chases in opposite directions at different speeds, color-gradients flow through blue-magenta spectrum, and shadows cast at opposing angles amplify helical depth.

<style>

A spinning aperture iris where four concentric rings rotate in opposite directions while counter-scaling, each ring's stroke-dasharray animates in opposing directions at staggered speeds, stroke-color sequences through cyan-magenta-yellow gradient pairs, inner shadows alternate between sharp and soft blur, and the central clip-path creates a pulsing aperture.

A bouncing basketball where the ball scales vertically while squashing horizontally on impact, the impact zone clips a radial burst-pattern that expands then contracts, the ball's shadow stretches during flight and compresses on landing, a surrounding glow's stroke-width pulses, and secondary bounce opacity fades in staggered rhythm.

An interlocking gear mechanism where the primary gear rotates clockwise while two secondary gears counter-rotate at staggered speeds, each gear's stroke-width modulates inversely with rotation speed, stroke-color cycles through complementary gold-and-purple pairs, and skewed perspective shadows shift angle beneath each gear.

A starfield warp effect where six concentric circular clip-path masks expand and contract in rippling waves while rotating slowly, each layer reveals shifting background gradients moving diagonally beneath in parallax, the outermost clip's border-radius morphs from sharp to rounded and back in sync with expansion, and a radial shadow expands then contracts concentrically to create a tunnel-vision depth effect across all rings.

A neon sign flicker effect where the text's stroke animates as a glowing outline that brightens then dims in rapid bursts, the stroke-color flashes from white through electric blue to pale cyan in staggered 80ms cycles, the text's fill-opacity alternates between full and 60% transparency creating a blink effect, and a surrounding glow's stroke-width pulses inverse to brightness (thick when bright, thin when dim) across four intensity phases with timing synchronized to the flicker rhythm.

A water ripple effect where three concentric circular clips expand outward in staggered 150ms waves while their border-radius cycles from sharp (0%) to fully rounded (50%) and back, each clip-path reveals layered background-position shifts moving upward in parallax, the outermost ring's stroke-width modulates to create a visible wave boundary that fattens then thins, and a soft shadow radiates concentrically around each expanding ring to suggest dimensional water depth and surface tension.

A concentric pulsing rings animation where four nested circles scale outward simultaneously while counter-rotating (outer clockwise, inner counter-clockwise), each ring's stroke-dasharray animates in opposite directions at different speeds creating visual tension, stroke-color ripples through complementary gradient pairs offset by 100ms per ring, each ring's stroke-width oscillates inversely with rotation speed (thin when fast, thick when slow), and layered shadows cast at opposing angles to exaggerate the three-dimensional vortex breathing effect across staggered timing phases.

A paper plane flight sequence where the plane translates upward along a curved arc while rotating on three axes simultaneously, its fuselage stroke-dasharray animates as if wind-peeling the outline backward with a 150ms lag behind the head's movement, the plane's clip-path narrows and widens to simulate banking turns, the shadow beneath stretches at sharp angles during turns then compresses in straight flight, and background-position shifts diagonally to create wind-swept depth parallax with the plane's banking rhythm.

A metaball merge where two orbs translate toward each other while their borders skew inward, meeting at center where border-radius fully rounds and merges, both orbs' stroke-dasharray chases inward from opposite sides at staggered 80ms intervals, stroke-color transitions from cool blue to warm magenta as they fuse, and the merged shadow intensifies and centralizes creating dimensional compression.

A radar sweep with a rotating beam where concentric circular stroke-dasharray rings expand outward while counter-rotating, the beam's stroke-width pulses as it sweeps past detected blips, stroke-color shifts from pale green (inactive) to vibrant lime (active) for each detected target in staggered 100ms bursts, and layered shadows cast behind each ring suggest depth rings receding into display glass.

A soap bubble wobble where a circular shape cycles border-radius from perfect sphere (50%) to slightly pinched (40%) and back in rapid three-phase oscillations, the bubble's stroke-dasharray animates as an iridescent shimmer traveling around the perimeter, stroke-color gradients shift through rainbow spectrum in opposing directions on alternating cycles, and a surrounding glow shadow expands and contracts inverse to the pinch rhythm.

A DNA helix unwind where two intertwined strands translate upward while rotating and skewing on opposing axes in staggered 120ms phases, each strand's stroke-width oscillates inversely (thin to thick) creating braiding tension, stroke-dasharray chases bidirectionally at different speeds, stroke-color sequences through cyan-magenta-blue complementary pairs, and opposing angle shadows amplify the helical unwinding depth.

<svg width="300" height="300" viewBox="0 0 300 300">
  <defs>
    <filter id="shadowDNA" x="-50%" y="-50%" width="200%" height="200%">
      <feGaussianBlur in="SourceAlpha" stdDeviation="2"/>
      <feOffset dx="3" dy="0" result="offsetblur"/>
      <feComponentTransfer>
        <feFuncA type="linear" slope="0.3"/>
      </feComponentTransfer>
      <feMerge>
        <feMergeNode/>
        <feMergeNode in="SourceGraphic"/>
      </feMerge>
    </filter>
  </defs>
  <path class="dna-strand strand1" d="M 80 50 Q 100 80 120 110 Q 100 140 80 170 Q 60 140 80 110 Q 100 80 80 50" filter="url(#shadowDNA)"/>
  <path class="dna-strand strand2" d="M 120 50 Q 100 80 80 110 Q 100 140 120 170 Q 140 140 120 110 Q 100 80 120 50" filter="url(#shadowDNA)"/>
</svg>
<style>
.dna-strand {
  fill: none;
  stroke: cyan;
  stroke-linecap: round;
  stroke-linejoin: round;
  animation: dna-unwind 3s ease-in-out infinite;
}

.strand1 {
  animation: dna-unwind 3s ease-in-out infinite, strand-width1 2s ease-in-out infinite, strand-color1 3s ease-in-out infinite;
  animation-delay: 0ms, 0ms, 0ms;
  transform-origin: 100px 150px;
}

.strand2 {
  animation: dna-unwind 3s ease-in-out infinite, strand-width2 2s ease-in-out infinite, strand-color2 3s ease-in-out infinite;
  animation-delay: 120ms, 120ms, 120ms;
  transform-origin: 100px 150px;
}

@keyframes dna-unwind {
  0% {
    transform: translateY(0) rotateZ(0deg) skewY(0deg);
    stroke-dasharray: 100;
    stroke-dashoffset: 0;
  }
  50% {
    transform: translateY(-40px) rotateZ(180deg) skewY(5deg);
    stroke-dasharray: 100;
    stroke-dashoffset: -50;
  }
  100% {
    transform: translateY(0) rotateZ(360deg) skewY(0deg);
    stroke-dasharray: 100;
    stroke-dashoffset: 0;
  }
}

@keyframes strand-width1 {
  0%, 100% { stroke-width: 2px; }
  50% { stroke-width: 6px; }
}

@keyframes strand-width2 {
  0%, 100% { stroke-width: 6px; }
  50% { stroke-width: 2px; }
}

@keyframes strand-color1 {
  0% { stroke: cyan; }
  33% { stroke: magenta; }
  66% { stroke: blue; }
  100% { stroke: cyan; }
}

@keyframes strand-color2 {
  0% { stroke: magenta; }
  33% { stroke: blue; }
  66% { stroke: cyan; }
  100% { stroke: magenta; }
}
</style>

A lightning crack where the jagged arc skews between ±35° on sharp angles while its stroke-width modulates across three crackling peaks suggesting electrical intensity bursts, stroke-dasharray animates as a pulsing glow traveling the entire path length, stroke-color flashes white-purple-deep-blue in rapid 50ms offsets, the shadow beside the bolt stretches and compresses perpendicular, and clip-path masks create jagged reveal-conceal reveals.

<svg width="300" height="300" viewBox="0 0 300 300">

</svg>
<style>
.lightning-bolt {
  fill: none;
  stroke: white;
  stroke-linecap: round;
  stroke-linejoin: round;
  stroke-width: 3px;
  animation: bolt-skew 1.2s ease-in-out infinite, bolt-width 0.6s ease-in-out infinite, bolt-dash 0.8s linear infinite, bolt-color 0.15s step-start infinite, bolt-shadow 1s ease-in-out infinite;

@keyframes bolt-skew {

    transform: skewX(0deg);
  }
  25% {

  }
  50% {
    transform: skewX(-35deg);
  }
  75% {
    transform: skewX(20deg);
  }
}

@keyframes bolt-width {

  25% { stroke-width: 8px; }
  50% { stroke-width: 2px; }
  75% { stroke-width: 7px; }
}

@keyframes bolt-dash {
  0% {
    stroke-dasharray: 300;
    stroke-dashoffset: 300;
  }
  50% {
    stroke-dasharray: 300;
    stroke-dashoffset: -300;
  }
  100% {
    stroke-dasharray: 300;
    stroke-dashoffset: 300;
  }

@keyframes bolt-color {

@keyframes bolt-shadow {

  }

  }
}
</style>

An unfurling spiral expanding outward from center while rotating continuously, its stroke-dasharray accelerates then decelerates in four breathing rhythm phases, stroke-color gradually morphs from cool blue through turquoise to warm orange across the 4-second full cycle, spiral curve intersections' border-radius shifts from 0% sharp to 15% rounded creating organic flow, and a concentric expanding shadow suggests helical coiling depth recession.

<svg width="300" height="300" viewBox="0 0 300 300">
  <defs>
    <filter id="spiralShadow" x="-50%" y="-50%" width="200%" height="200%">
      <feGaussianBlur in="SourceAlpha" stdDeviation="4"/>

      <feComponentTransfer>

<style>
.spiral {
  fill: none;
  stroke: #0088ff;
  stroke-linecap: round;
  stroke-linejoin: round;
  stroke-width: 3px;
  animation: spiral-expand 4s ease-in-out infinite, spiral-rotate 4s linear infinite, spiral-dash 4s ease-in-out infinite, spiral-color 4s ease-in-out infinite, spiral-radius 4s ease-in-out infinite;

@keyframes spiral-expand {

  }
  50% {

  }
}

@keyframes spiral-dash {

  }

    stroke-dasharray: 200;
    stroke-dashoffset: -50;
  }
  50% {

    stroke-dashoffset: -100;
  }

    stroke-dashoffset: -50;

@keyframes spiral-color {

  }

@keyframes spiral-radius {

  }

</style>

Matrix-style falling glyphs descending in staggered columns where each character's stroke animates as a glowing outline brightening then dimming across three cycles, fill-color shifts from neon green through gray-green suggesting digital decay in staggered offsets, glyph border-radius morphs from sharp to slightly rounded as opacity fades, and background-position scrolls vertically in parallax creating depth with staggered column timing.

An expanding spiral rotating clockwise where its stroke-dasharray accelerates then decelerates in four tempo breathing phases, stroke-color shifts from cool blue through turquoise to warm orange across the full cycle, the spiral's curve intersections' border-radius morphs from 0% to 15% creating organic fluidity, the shape scales outward while rotating, and a concentric shadow radiates then contracts suggesting helical depth.

<svg class="spiral-container" viewBox="0 0 300 300" width="300" height="300">

<style>
.spiral-container {

}

.spiral-path {

  stroke-linecap: round;
  stroke-linejoin: round;

  stroke-dasharray: 400;
  stroke-dashoffset: 0;
}

.spiral-shadow {

  animation: shadowPulse 4s ease-in-out infinite;

@keyframes spiralRotate {

  50% { transform: rotate(180deg) scale(1.1); }
  100% { transform: rotate(360deg) scale(1); }

@keyframes spiralDash {

  100% { stroke-dashoffset: -400; }

@keyframes spiralColor {

  33% { stroke: #06b6d4; }
  66% { stroke: #f97316; }
  100% { stroke: #0ea5e9; }

  100% { r: 80; opacity: 0.1; }
}
</style>

A bouncing basketball scaling vertically while squashing horizontally on impact, the impact zone clips a radial burst-pattern expanding then contracting, the ball's shadow stretches during flight and compresses on landing, a surrounding glow's stroke-width pulses to accentuate bounce rhythm, the ball's border-radius subtly rounds during flight and sharpens on landing, and secondary bounces fade in staggered opacity diminishing sequence.

A concentric ripple effect where six circular clips expand and contract in rippling waves with staggered 150ms timing, each clip-path layer reveals layered background gradients shifting position diagonally beneath in parallax, the outermost clip's border-radius morphs from sharp to fully rounded, a radial shadow expands concentrically creating tunnel-vision depth, and stroke-width modulates on each ring boundary.

A kaleidoscopic pinwheel where six triangular wedges rotate clockwise while scaling outward in staggered 100ms sequence, each wedge's stroke-width modulates rhythmically to the rotation beat, stroke-color sequences through rainbow spectrum offset by 50ms per wedge, border-radius subtly rounds wedge vertices as they expand outward, and layered shadows at varying opacity suggest radial depth recession with staggered timing.

A neon sign flicker where the text's stroke animates as a glowing outline brightening then dimming in rapid bursts, stroke-color flashes white-electric-blue-pale-cyan in staggered 80ms cycles, the text fill-opacity alternates between 100% and 60% transparency creating blink effect, and a surrounding glow's stroke-width pulses inverse to brightness in four intensity phases synchronized to flicker rhythm with multi-phase timing.

An interlocking gear mechanism where the primary gear rotates clockwise while two secondary gears counter-rotate at staggered speeds, each gear's stroke-width modulates inversely with rotation speed suggesting mechanical tension, stroke-color cycles through gold-and-purple complementary pairs in offset rhythm, and skewed perspective shadows shift angle beneath each gear to exaggerate three-dimensional mechanical engagement depth.

A water ripple effect where three concentric circular clips expand outward in staggered 150ms waves while border-radius cycles from sharp (0%) to fully rounded (50%), each clip-path reveals layered background-position shifts moving upward in parallax, the ring's stroke-width modulates to create visible wave boundaries that fatten then thin, and soft shadow radiates around each expanding ring suggesting water depth.

A cascading domino wave where eight rectangular blocks translate downward at staggered velocities, on contact each block skews forward while its border-radius subtly rounds creating deformation effect, the stroke-width fattens at the impact point suggesting compression, the shadow beneath stretches horizontally on falling then snaps back vertically, and color darkens on blocks post-fall.

An audio waveform visualization where eight vertical bars translate upward and downward at staggered 100ms intervals while their stroke-dasharray animates as glowing outlines, stroke-color ripples through cool-blue to vibrant-cyan to warm-magenta spectrum in cascading waves, each bar's stroke-width modulates inversely with height (thin tall, thick short), and shadows beneath stretch vertically then compress based on movement intensity.

A radiating sunburst where six geometric rays rotate outward from center while their stroke-width scales rhythmically in sync with rotation, stroke-color transitions through yellow-orange-deep-red in a three-phase heating sequence with staggered 80ms offsets, a surrounding halo's border-radius morphs from sharp to completely rounded and back, and the outer glow's shadow intensifies at peak animation creating concentric ring depth effects.

A liquid blob morphing where border-radius cycles between sharp angular protrusions and fully bulbous rounded lobes while translating vertically, the blob's stroke-dasharray animates as a glowing surface tension wave, stroke-color ripples through cool-to-warm gradient in staggered phases, and an inner shadow inverts suggesting internal pressure pulses.

A pulsating heartbeat line where the SVG path skews horizontally while border-radius on curve endpoints morphs from sharp to rounded, the stroke-width surges in three sharp peaks synchronized to beats, stroke-color flashes red-white-red in rapid cycles, and a soft shadow dilates and contracts beneath the entire waveform.

<svg class="heartbeat-line" width="280" height="120" viewBox="0 0 280 120" style="position: relative; left: 10px; top: 90px;">

<style>

A blooming flower where six petals scale outward from center in staggered sequence while rotating clockwise, each petal's border-radius softens from sharp angular points to rounded lobes as scale increases, the petal's stroke-dasharray animates as a wave rippling outward, stroke-color sequences through warm yellow-orange-red gradient with offset timing per petal, and a central expanding shadow creates concentric rings.

<svg viewBox="0 0 300 300" width="300" height="300">
  <defs>

    </g>
    <g class="petal petal3" filter="url(#bloomShadow)">

    </g>

<style>
svg {
  width: 300px;
  height: 300px;
}

.flower {
  animation: bloomExpand 4s ease-out infinite;
}

.petal {

}

.petal4 {

An aperture iris where four concentric rings rotate in opposite directions while counter-scaling, each ring's stroke-dasharray animates in opposing directions at staggered speeds, stroke-color sequences through cyan-magenta-yellow gradient pairs, inner shadows alternate between sharp and soft, and the central clip-path creates pulsing aperture opening-closing effect.

<svg viewBox="0 0 300 300" width="300" height="300">
  <defs>
    <filter id="irisGlow">
      <feGaussianBlur in="SourceAlpha" stdDeviation="2"/>
    </filter>
  </defs>
  <g class="iris">
    <circle cx="150" cy="150" r="80" fill="none" stroke="#00ffff" stroke-width="3" class="ring ring1" stroke-dasharray="251" stroke-dashoffset="0"/>
    <circle cx="150" cy="150" r="65" fill="none" stroke="#ff00ff" stroke-width="3" class="ring ring2" stroke-dasharray="204" stroke-dashoffset="0"/>
    <circle cx="150" cy="150" r="50" fill="none" stroke="#ffff00" stroke-width="3" class="ring ring3" stroke-dasharray="157" stroke-dashoffset="0"/>
    <circle cx="150" cy="150" r="35" fill="none" stroke="#00ffff" stroke-width="3" class="ring ring4" stroke-dasharray="110" stroke-dashoffset="0"/>
    <circle cx="150" cy="150" r="20" fill="#333" class="aperture"/>
  </g>
</svg>
<style>
svg {
  width: 300px;
  height: 300px;
}

.iris {
  animation: apertureOpen 3s ease-in-out infinite;
}

.ring1 {
  animation: ringRotate 3s linear infinite, dashFlow 2s linear infinite;
  filter: drop-shadow(0px 0px 2px rgba(0,255,255,0.6));
}

.ring2 {
  animation: ringRotateReverse 3s linear infinite, dashFlowReverse 2.2s linear infinite;
  animation-delay: 0s;
  filter: drop-shadow(0px 0px 2px rgba(255,0,255,0.6));
}

.ring3 {
  animation: ringRotate 2.8s linear infinite, dashFlow 1.8s linear infinite;
  animation-delay: 0.2s;
  filter: drop-shadow(0px 0px 2px rgba(255,255,0,0.6));
}

.ring4 {
  animation: ringRotateReverse 3.2s linear infinite, dashFlowReverse 2.4s linear infinite;
  animation-delay: 0.4s;
  filter: drop-shadow(0px 0px 2px rgba(0,255,255,0.6));
}

@keyframes ringRotate {
  0% { transform: rotate(0deg); }
  100% { transform: rotate(360deg); }
}

@keyframes ringRotateReverse {
  0% { transform: rotate(360deg); }
  100% { transform: rotate(0deg); }
}

@keyframes dashFlow {
  0% { stroke-dashoffset: 0; }
  100% { stroke-dashoffset: -60; }
}

@keyframes dashFlowReverse {
  0% { stroke-dashoffset: 0; }
  100% { stroke-dashoffset: 60; }
}

.aperture {
  animation: apertureScale 3s ease-in-out infinite;
  filter: drop-shadow(0px 0px 3px rgba(0,0,0,0.8));
}

@keyframes apertureScale {

Concentric pulsing rings expanding outward where each ring's clip-path creates a doughnut expanding then contracting in alternating staggered 150ms cycles, stroke-dasharray chases bidirectionally per ring, stroke-color ripples through cyan-magenta-yellow complementary pairs, and layered shadows radiate at opposing angles.

A morphing blob where clip-path creates organic undulating edges while border-radius cycles angular protrusions-to-fully-bulbous in three-phase surges, the stroke-color transitions cool blue through purple to warm pink, and an inverted inner shadow pulses outward suggesting internal pressure waves.

A lightning strike where the jagged path's clip-path creates sharp angular reveals while skewing left-right at extreme ±40° angles, the stroke-dasharray pulses as glowing crackling waves, stroke-color flashes white-purple-blue-white in 60ms rapid offsets, and shadows stretch perpendicular creating menacing depth.

A kaleidoscopic pattern where six triangular clip-paths rotate clockwise while skewing inward toward center in staggered 100ms bursts, each wedge's stroke-width pulsates to rotation beat, stroke-color sequences through rainbow red-orange-yellow-green-blue-purple, and layered shadows cast at varying opacity suggest vortex depth.

Geometric shapes translating inward toward a center point where clip-paths narrow and sharpen progressively during convergence, each shape's stroke-width fattens 1px-to-3px, stroke-color builds muted-gray-to-vibrant-blue in staggered phases, and overlapping shadows darken suggesting compression depth.

A parallelogram grid where each cell skews ±15° in rapid alternating bursts while border-radius cycles sharp-to-rounded, stroke-color ripples cool-cyan-to-warm-orange in staggered 60ms waves, stroke-width modulates on edges, and shadows beneath shift angle inverse to skew direction.

A twisted ribbon unfurling where the stroke skews dramatically ±45° angles while stroke-dasharray chases the entire length in traveling waves, stroke-width modulates thin-to-thick suggesting tension, border-radius softens curve intersections, and color transitions gold-to-copper-to-rust suggesting metallic twist.

<svg width="300" height="300" viewBox="0 0 300 300">
  <path d="M 50 150 Q 150 80 250 150 Q 150 220 50 150" class="ribbon" fill="none" stroke="#d97706" stroke-width="30" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-dasharray="400" stroke-dashoffset="0"/>
</svg>

<style>
svg {
  width: 100%;
  height: 100%;
}

.ribbon {
  animation: twistUnfurl 3s ease-in-out infinite;
  filter: drop-shadow(0 8px 16px rgba(0,0,0,0.3));
}

@keyframes twistUnfurl {
  0% {
    stroke: #d97706;
    stroke-width: 20;
    stroke-dashoffset: 400;
    transform: skewX(-45deg);
    filter: drop-shadow(0 4px 8px rgba(0,0,0,0.2));
  }
  25% {
    stroke: #d97706;
    stroke-width: 28;
    transform: skewX(-30deg);
  }
  50% {
    stroke: #a16207;
    stroke-width: 35;
    stroke-dashoffset: 0;
    transform: skewX(0deg);
    filter: drop-shadow(0 12px 24px rgba(217,119,6,0.5));
    border-radius: 50%;
  }
  75% {
    stroke: #7c2d12;
    stroke-width: 28;
    transform: skewX(30deg);
  }
  100% {
    stroke: #7c2d12;
    stroke-width: 20;
    stroke-dashoffset: -400;
    transform: skewX(45deg);
    filter: drop-shadow(0 8px 16px rgba(0,0,0,0.3));
  }
}
</style>

A kaleidoscopic mandala where six triangular wedges skew inward-outward while rotating counterclockwise at varying speeds, stroke-dasharray animates in staggered directions per wedge, border-radius morphs sharp-vertices-to-rounded-lobes, and stroke-color sequences rainbow spectrum in cascading staggered waves.

<svg viewBox="0 0 300 300" style="width: 300px; height: 300px;">
  <g class="mandala">
    <path class="wedge wedge1" d="M 150 150 L 150 80 A 70 70 0 0 1 210.62 89.38 Z"/>
    <path class="wedge wedge2" d="M 150 150 L 210.62 89.38 A 70 70 0 0 1 240 150 Z"/>
    <path class="wedge wedge3" d="M 150 150 L 240 150 A 70 70 0 0 1 210.62 210.62 Z"/>
    <path class="wedge wedge4" d="M 150 150 L 210.62 210.62 A 70 70 0 0 1 150 220 Z"/>
    <path class="wedge wedge5" d="M 150 150 L 150 220 A 70 70 0 0 1 89.38 210.62 Z"/>
    <path class="wedge wedge6" d="M 150 150 L 89.38 210.62 A 70 70 0 0 1 60 150 Z"/>
  </g>
</svg>

<style>
.mandala {
  animation: rotateMandala 8s linear infinite reverse;
  transform-origin: 150px 150px;
}

.wedge {
  fill: none;
  stroke-width: 3;
  stroke-linecap: round;
  stroke-linejoin: round;
  transform-origin: 150px 150px;
  filter: drop-shadow(0 0 2px rgba(0,0,0,0.1));
}

.wedge1 {
  animation: skewWedge 3s ease-in-out infinite, dashWedge 2s linear infinite, colorWedge 6s linear infinite, radiusWedge 3s ease-in-out infinite;
  stroke-dasharray: 60, 40;
}

.wedge2 {
  animation: skewWedge 3.5s ease-in-out infinite 0.3s, dashWedge 2s linear infinite 0.2s reverse, colorWedge 6s linear infinite 1s, radiusWedge 3s ease-in-out infinite 0.3s;
  stroke-dasharray: 60, 40;
  animation-delay: 0.3s, 0.2s, 1s, 0.3s;
}

.wedge3 {
  animation: skewWedge 3s ease-in-out infinite 0.6s, dashWedge 2s linear infinite 0.4s reverse, colorWedge 6s linear infinite 2s, radiusWedge 3s ease-in-out infinite 0.6s;
  stroke-dasharray: 60, 40;
  animation-delay: 0.6s, 0.4s, 2s, 0.6s;
}

.wedge4 {
  animation: skewWedge 3.5s ease-in-out infinite 0.9s, dashWedge 2s linear infinite 0.6s reverse, colorWedge 6s linear infinite 3s, radiusWedge 3s ease-in-out infinite 0.9s;
  stroke-dasharray: 60, 40;
  animation-delay: 0.9s, 0.6s, 3s, 0.9s;
}

.wedge5 {
  animation: skewWedge 3s ease-in-out infinite 1.2s, dashWedge 2s linear infinite 0.8s reverse, colorWedge 6s linear infinite 4s, radiusWedge 3s ease-in-out infinite 1.2s;
  stroke-dasharray: 60, 40;
  animation-delay: 1.2s, 0.8s, 4s, 1.2s;
}

.wedge6 {
  animation: skewWedge 3.5s ease-in-out infinite 1.5s, dashWedge 2s linear infinite 1s reverse, colorWedge 6s linear infinite 5s, radiusWedge 3s ease-in-out infinite 1.5s;
  stroke-dasharray: 60, 40;
  animation-delay: 1.5s, 1s, 5s, 1.5s;
}

@keyframes rotateMandala {
  from { transform: rotate(0deg); }
  to { transform: rotate(-360deg); }
}

@keyframes skewWedge {
  0%, 100% { transform: skewY(0deg); }
  50% { transform: skewY(-8deg); }
}

@keyframes dashWedge {
  0% { stroke-dashoffset: 0; }
  100% { stroke-dashoffset: -100; }
}

@keyframes colorWedge {
  0% { stroke: #ff0000; }
  16.67% { stroke: #ff7f00; }
  33.33% { stroke: #ffff00; }
  50% { stroke: #00ff00; }
  66.67% { stroke: #0000ff; }
  83.33% { stroke: #4b0082; }
  100% { stroke: #ff0000; }
}

@keyframes radiusWedge {
  0%, 100% { rx: 0; ry: 0; }
  50% { rx: 12; ry: 12; }
}
</style>

A sliding door mechanism where two rectangular panels skew inward while sliding horizontally, border-radius on panel corners morphs sharp-to-rounded during motion, stroke-width modulates suggesting metal stress and friction, and layered shadows shift angle creating dimensional gap depth.

A morphing star that transforms from sharp points to rounded lobes by cycling border-radius, the stroke animates as a gradient that flows around the perimeter in a three-second loop, stroke color shifts from gold through silver, the shadow beneath intensifies as border-radius increases (rounder = darker), and the entire shape scales in and out of the stroke width modulation.

Interlocking rings that rotate at different speeds while their border-radius cycles between sharp and fully rounded, each ring's stroke-dasharray animates in staggered 100ms offsets, stroke color ripples through a color gradient sequence, and inner shadows alternate between sharp and soft focus in sync with the border-radius morphing to suggest ring thickness variation.

A whirlwind effect where particles scale outward from center while rotating rapidly, each particle's stroke animates with a dash pattern that spirals outward, stroke color gradient flows from cool center to warm edges in staggered ripples, the particle's shadow stretches radially and contracts, and opacity fades from opaque core to transparent periphery across the expanding arc.

<svg viewBox="0 0 300 300" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="300" height="300">
  <defs>
    <radialGradient id="bgGrad" cx="50%" cy="50%" r="50%">
      <stop offset="0%" stop-color="#0a0015"/>
      <stop offset="100%" stop-color="#000008"/>
    </radialGradient>
    <filter id="glow1"><feGaussianBlur stdDeviation="2" result="b"/><feMerge><feMergeNode in="b"/><feMergeNode in="SourceGraphic"/></feMerge></filter>
    <filter id="glow2"><feGaussianBlur stdDeviation="3" result="b"/><feMerge><feMergeNode in="b"/><feMergeNode in="SourceGraphic"/></feMerge></filter>
  </defs>
  <rect width="300" height="300" fill="url(#bgGrad)"/>

  <!-- Core glow -->
  <circle cx="150" cy="150" r="12" fill="#ffffff" opacity="0.9" filter="url(#glow2)">
    <animate attributeName="r" values="12;16;10;14;12" dur="2s" repeatCount="indefinite"/>
    <animate attributeName="opacity" values="0.9;1;0.7;0.9;0.9" dur="2s" repeatCount="indefinite"/>
  </circle>

  <!-- Particle macro template: 8 particles at different angles -->
  <g filter="url(#glow1)">

    <!-- Particle 1: 0deg -->
    <line x1="150" y1="150" x2="150" y2="150" stroke="#66ccff" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round">
      <animate attributeName="x2" values="150;150;162;180;210;150" keyTimes="0;0.1;0.3;0.6;0.9;1" dur="2s" repeatCount="indefinite"/>

      <animate attributeName="stroke" values="#66ccff;#88eeff;#ffaa44;#ff6622;transparent" keyTimes="0;0.3;0.6;0.85;1" dur="2s" repeatCount="indefinite"/>
      <animate attributeName="stroke-width" values="2;3;2.5;1.5;0" keyTimes="0;0.3;0.6;0.85;1" dur="2s" repeatCount="indefinite"/>
      <animate attributeName="stroke-dasharray" values="2,4;6,3;10,5;14,8;20,20" keyTimes="0;0.25;0.5;0.75;1" dur="2s" repeatCount="indefinite"/>
      <animate attributeName="stroke-dashoffset" values="0;-10;-20;-35;-60" keyTimes="0;0.25;0.5;0.75;1" dur="2s" repeatCount="indefinite"/>

      <animate attributeName="y2" values="150;148;135;110;80;150" keyTimes="0;0.1;0.3;0.6;0.9;1" dur="2s" begin="0.25s" repeatCount="indefinite"/>

      <animate attributeName="stroke-dasharray" values="2,6;5,4;9,6;13,9;18,18" keyTimes="0;0.25;0.5;0.75;1" dur="2s" begin="0.25s" repeatCount="indefinite"/>
      <animate attributeName="stroke-dashoffset" values="0;-8;-18;-30;-50" keyTimes="0;0.25;0.5;0.75;1" dur="2s" begin="0.25s" repeatCount="indefinite"/>
      <animate attributeName="opacity" values="1;1;0.8;0.4;0" keyTimes="0;0.3;0.6;0.85;1" dur="2s" begin="0.25s" repeatCount="indefinite"/>

      <animate attributeName="y2" values="150;152;165;190;225;150" keyTimes="0;0.1;0.3;0.6;0.9;1" dur="2s" begin="1s" repeatCount="indefinite"/>
      <animate attributeName="stroke" values="#ffcc66;#ffee99;#ff9944;#ff5500;transparent" keyTimes="0;0.3;0.6;0.85;1" dur="2s" begin="1s" repeatCount="indefinite"/>
      <animate attributeName="stroke-dasharray" values="2,4;5,5;9,6;13,9;18,18" keyTimes="0;0.25;0.5;0.75;1" dur="2s" begin="1s" repeatCount="indefinite"/>
      <animate attributeName="stroke-dashoffset" values="0;-8;-18;-32;-52" keyTimes="0;0.25;0.5;0.75;1" dur="2s" begin="1s" repeatCount="indefinite"/>

    <!-- Particle 6: 225deg, stagger 1.25s -->

      <animate attributeName="y2" values="150;152;163;186;215;150" keyTimes="0;0.1;0.3;0.6;0.9;1" dur="2s" begin="1.25s" repeatCount="indefinite"/>

      <animate attributeName="stroke-dasharray" values="2,6;6,4;10,5;14,8;20,20" keyTimes="0;0.25;0.5;0.75;1" dur="2s" begin="1.25s" repeatCount="indefinite"/>
      <animate attributeName="stroke-dashoffset" values="0;-10;-22;-36;-60" keyTimes="0;0.25;0.5;0.75;1" dur="2s" begin="1.25s" repeatCount="indefinite"/>

  <!-- Rotation wrapper for whole whirlwind -->

</svg>
<style>

A branching tree where limbs translate outward from a central trunk while rotating, each limb's stroke-dasharray animates to suggest growth, stroke color builds from brown base to green tips in staggered phases, the limb's stroke-width scales with growth progression, and shadow angles shift to suggest directional light as limbs extend, with clip-path masking to reveal leaves at branch tips.

<svg viewBox="0 0 300 300" width="300" height="300" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg">
  <!-- Trunk -->
  <line class="trunk" x1="150" y1="280" x2="150" y2="180" stroke="#6b3a1f" stroke-width="8" stroke-linecap="round"/>
  <!-- Main branches -->
  <g class="branch-group b1">
    <line class="branch" x1="150" y1="200" x2="90" y2="150" stroke-linecap="round"/>
    <line class="sub-branch sb1" x1="90" y1="150" x2="55" y2="115" stroke-linecap="round"/>
    <line class="sub-branch sb2" x1="90" y1="150" x2="75" y2="110" stroke-linecap="round"/>

  </g>
  <!-- Top branch -->
  <g class="branch-group b5">
    <line class="branch" x1="150" y1="180" x2="150" y2="120" stroke-linecap="round"/>
    <line class="sub-branch sb9" x1="150" y1="120" x2="132" y2="82" stroke-linecap="round"/>
    <line class="sub-branch sb10" x1="150" y1="120" x2="168" y2="82" stroke-linecap="round"/>
    <ellipse class="leaf l9" cx="128" cy="74" rx="9" ry="5" transform="rotate(-15,128,74)"/>
    <ellipse class="leaf l10" cx="170" cy="74" rx="9" ry="5" transform="rotate(15,170,74)"/>
    <ellipse class="leaf l11" cx="150" cy="68" rx="10" ry="6"/>
  </g>
</svg>

<style>
/* Trunk */
.trunk {
  filter: drop-shadow(2px 4px 3px rgba(0,0,0,0.4));
  stroke-dasharray: 100;
  stroke-dashoffset: 100;
  animation: trunkGrow 1s ease-out forwards;
}
@keyframes trunkGrow {
  to { stroke-dashoffset: 0; }
}

/* Branch base styles */
.branch {
  stroke: #8B4513;
  stroke-width: 4;
  stroke-dasharray: 85;
  stroke-dashoffset: 85;
  fill: none;
  filter: drop-shadow(1px 3px 2px rgba(0,0,0,0.3));
}
.sub-branch {
  stroke: #5a8a20;
  stroke-width: 2.5;
  stroke-dasharray: 55;
  stroke-dashoffset: 55;
  fill: none;
}

/* Branch group shadows via filter */
.branch-group { filter: drop-shadow(2px 3px 3px rgba(0,0,0,0.25)); }

/* Leaves */
.leaf {
  fill: #3a8c1a;
  stroke: #2d6e14;
  stroke-width: 1;
  opacity: 0;
  transform-origin: center;
}

/* Staggered branch animations */
.b1 .branch { animation: branchGrow 1.2s 0.9s ease-out forwards, branchColor 1.2s 0.9s ease-out forwards; }
.b1 .sb1    { animation: subGrow 1s 1.9s ease-out forwards; }
.b1 .sb2    { animation: subGrow 1s 2.1s ease-out forwards; }
.b1 .l1     { animation: leafReveal 0.6s 2.8s ease-out forwards; }
.b1 .l2     { animation: leafReveal 0.6s 3.0s ease-out forwards; }

.b2 .branch { animation: branchGrow 1.2s 1.0s ease-out forwards, branchColor 1.2s 1.0s ease-out forwards; }
.b2 .sb3    { animation: subGrow 1s 2.0s ease-out forwards; }
.b2 .sb4    { animation: subGrow 1s 2.2s ease-out forwards; }

.b2 .l4     { animation: leafReveal 0.6s 3.1s ease-out forwards; }

.b3 .branch { animation: branchGrow 1.2s 1.1s ease-out forwards, branchColor 1.2s 1.1s ease-out forwards; }
.b3 .sb5    { animation: subGrow 1s 2.1s ease-out forwards; }
.b3 .sb6    { animation: subGrow 1s 2.3s ease-out forwards; }
.b3 .l5     { animation: leafReveal 0.6s 3.0s ease-out forwards; }
.b3 .l6     { animation: leafReveal 0.6s 3.2s ease-out forwards; }

.b4 .branch { animation: branchGrow 1.2s 1.2s ease-out forwards, branchColor 1.2s 1.2s ease-out forwards; }
.b4 .sb7    { animation: subGrow 1s 2.2s ease-out forwards; }
.b4 .sb8    { animation: subGrow 1s 2.4s ease-out forwards; }
.b4 .l7     { animation: leafReveal 0.6s 3.1s ease-out forwards; }
.b4 .l8     { animation: leafReveal 0.6s 3.3s ease-out forwards; }

.b5 .branch { animation: branchGrow 1.2s 0.9s ease-out forwards, branchColor 1.2s 0.9s ease-out forwards; }
.b5 .sb9    { animation: subGrow 1s 1.9s ease-out forwards; }
.b5 .sb10   { animation: subGrow 1s 2.1s ease-out forwards; }
.b5 .l9     { animation: leafReveal 0.6s 2.8s ease-out forwards; }
.b5 .l10    { animation: leafReveal 0.6s 2.9s ease-out forwards; }
.b5 .l11    { animation: leafReveal 0.6s 3.0s ease-out forwards; }

@keyframes branchGrow {
  0%   { stroke-dashoffset: 85; stroke-width: 1; }
  50%  { stroke-dashoffset: 40; stroke-width: 3.5; }
  100% { stroke-dashoffset: 0;  stroke-width: 4; }
}
@keyframes branchColor {
  0%   { stroke: #6b3a1f; }
  60%  { stroke: #8B5e2a; }
  100% { stroke: #6a7d2a; }
}
@keyframes subGrow {
  0%   { stroke-dashoffset: 55; stroke-width: 1; }
  60%  { stroke-dashoffset: 20; stroke-width: 2; }
  100% { stroke-dashoffset: 0;  stroke-width: 2.5; }
}
@keyframes leafReveal {
  0%   { opacity: 0; transform: scale(0.2); clip-path: inset(50%); }
  60%  { opacity: 0.8; transform: scale(1.15); clip-path: inset(5%); }
  100% { opacity: 1;   transform: scale(1);    clip-path: inset(0%); }
}
</style>

An expanding mandala where twelve petals scale outward and rotate while their stroke-dasharray animates inward to suggest contraction against expansion, the stroke color gradient flows from center warmth to peripheral coolness in repeating cycles, each petal's border-radius softens at peak extension, layered shadows cast inward then outward, and the background-position scrolls behind in counter-rotation to create a mesmerizing mandala depth effect.

A falling confetti stream where individual pieces translate downward at staggered speeds while their border-radius morphs from sharp corners to fully rounded mid-fall, rotating on multiple axes simultaneously, with shadow stretch-and-compress beneath each piece and opacity fading from opaque to transparent, creating a cascading, dimensional flutter effect.

An hourglass with falling sand particles that translate downward at varying speeds while their opacity fades, each sand grain's border-radius morphs from sharp to rounded, and shadows stretch vertically beneath them; the hourglass frame's stroke-dasharray animates as a boundary outline while the background-position scrolls to simulate sand pile accumulation.

A clock face where three hands sweep at different speeds while their stroke-width modulates inversely with rotation speed, the stroke-dasharray chases along each hand's length in staggered phases, stroke color shifts from silver through gold, and the clock's border-radius morphs subtly to suggest the glass face bulging and flattening with time's rhythm.

<style>
svg { display: block; }

.hour-hand {

}
@keyframes hour-rot {

}
@keyframes hour-dash {

.minute-hand {

.second-hand {
