A morphing star that transforms through eight phases while its border-radius cycles from razor-sharp (0%) points to softly rounded (25%) lobes, the stroke animates as a gradient flowing around the perimeter in a three-second loop, stroke color shifts from gold through silver to bronze, the shadow beneath intensifies as border-radius increases suggesting increased three-dimensionality, and the entire shape scales in and out of a subtle breathing rhythm.

Five interlocking rings that rotate at different speeds while their border-radius cycles between sharp (5%) and fully rounded (50%), each ring's stroke-dasharray animates in staggered 100ms offsets, stroke color ripples through a cyan-magenta-yellow gradient sequence, and inner shadows alternate between sharp focus and soft blur in sync with border-radius morphing to suggest ring thickness modulation.

A kaleidoscope pattern where twelve triangular wedges rotate clockwise while skewing on alternating axes, each wedge's stroke-width pulsates to a four-beat rhythm, stroke color sequences through a full rainbow gradient in staggered 30ms offsets per wedge, the center clips a rotating mask with morphing border-radius from sharp to rounded, and layered shadows cast at varying opacity to suggest radial depth layers.

A particle whirlwind where eight particles scale outward from center while rotating rapidly, each particle's stroke animates with a dash pattern spiraling outward in staggered phases, stroke color gradient flows from cool blue center to warm red edges in cascading ripples, the particle's shadow stretches radially outward then contracts, and opacity fades from opaque core through transparent periphery across the expanding vortex.

A rotating aperture where four concentric rings scale outward while counter-rotating in opposite directions, each ring's stroke-dasharray animates in opposing directions at staggered speeds, stroke color sequences through complementary gradient pairs offset by 200ms per ring, inner shadows alternate between sharp and diffuse, and the central clip-path shrinks then expands creating a pulsing iris effect across nested ring layers.

<svg viewBox="-150 -150 300 300" width="300" height="300" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg">
  <defs>
    <filter id="sharp">
      <feDropShadow dx="0" dy="0" stdDeviation="1" flood-color="#ff00ff" flood-opacity="0.9"/>
    </filter>
    <filter id="diffuse">
      <feDropShadow dx="0" dy="0" stdDeviation="8" flood-color="#00ffff" flood-opacity="0.5"/>
    </filter>
    <clipPath id="iris">
      <circle class="iris-clip" cx="0" cy="0" r="30"/>
    </clipPath>
  </defs>

  <!-- Ring 4 - outermost -->
  <circle class="ring r4" cx="0" cy="0" r="120" fill="none" stroke-width="6"/>
  <!-- Ring 3 -->
  <circle class="ring r3" cx="0" cy="0" r="90" fill="none" stroke-width="7"/>
  <!-- Ring 2 -->
  <circle class="ring r2" cx="0" cy="0" r="60" fill="none" stroke-width="8"/>
  <!-- Ring 1 - innermost visible -->
  <circle class="ring r1" cx="0" cy="0" r="35" fill="none" stroke-width="9"/>

  <!-- Iris center -->
  <circle class="iris" cx="0" cy="0" r="25"/>
</svg>

<style>
.ring {
  transform-origin: 0 0;
  transform-box: fill-box;
}

.r4 {
  stroke-dasharray: 754;
  stroke-dashoffset: 0;
  animation:
    rotateR4 6s linear infinite,
    dashR4 3s ease-in-out infinite,
    colorR4 4s ease-in-out infinite,
    shadowAlt 2s ease-in-out infinite;
  filter: url(#sharp);
}
.r3 {
  stroke-dasharray: 565;
  stroke-dashoffset: 0;
  animation:
    rotateR3 5s linear infinite,
    dashR3 2.5s ease-in-out infinite,
    colorR3 4s 0.2s ease-in-out infinite,
    shadowAlt2 2s 0.2s ease-in-out infinite;
  filter: url(#diffuse);
}
.r2 {
  stroke-dasharray: 377;
  stroke-dashoffset: 0;
  animation:
    rotateR4 4s linear infinite,
    dashR2 2s ease-in-out infinite,
    colorR2 4s 0.4s ease-in-out infinite,
    shadowAlt 2s 0.4s ease-in-out infinite;
  filter: url(#sharp);
}
.r1 {
  stroke-dasharray: 220;
  stroke-dashoffset: 0;
  animation:
    rotateR3 3s linear infinite,
    dashR1 1.5s ease-in-out infinite,
    colorR1 4s 0.6s ease-in-out infinite,
    shadowAlt2 2s 0.6s ease-in-out infinite;
  filter: url(#diffuse);
}

.iris {
  fill: #ff00ff;
  animation: irisAnim 2.4s ease-in-out infinite;
  transform-origin: 0 0;
  transform-box: fill-box;
}

/* Rotations: alternating CW and CCW */
@keyframes rotateR4 {
  from { transform: rotate(0deg) scale(1); }
  50%  { transform: rotate(180deg) scale(1.08); }
  to   { transform: rotate(360deg) scale(1); }
}
@keyframes rotateR3 {
  from { transform: rotate(0deg) scale(1); }
  50%  { transform: rotate(-180deg) scale(1.06); }
  to   { transform: rotate(-360deg) scale(1); }
}

/* Dash animations — opposing directions */
@keyframes dashR4 {
  0%   { stroke-dashoffset: 0; }
  50%  { stroke-dashoffset: 377; }
  100% { stroke-dashoffset: 754; }
}
@keyframes dashR3 {
  0%   { stroke-dashoffset: 565; }
  50%  { stroke-dashoffset: 282; }
  100% { stroke-dashoffset: 0; }
}
@keyframes dashR2 {
  0%   { stroke-dashoffset: 0; }
  50%  { stroke-dashoffset: 188; }
  100% { stroke-dashoffset: 377; }
}
@keyframes dashR1 {
  0%   { stroke-dashoffset: 220; }
  50%  { stroke-dashoffset: 110; }
  100% { stroke-dashoffset: 0; }
}

/* Color sequences through complementary pairs */
@keyframes colorR4 {
  0%   { stroke: #ff00ff; }
  25%  { stroke: #00ffff; }
  50%  { stroke: #ff6600; }
  75%  { stroke: #0066ff; }
  100% { stroke: #ff00ff; }
}
@keyframes colorR3 {
  0%   { stroke: #00ffff; }
  25%  { stroke: #ff00ff; }
  50%  { stroke: #0066ff; }
  75%  { stroke: #ff6600; }
  100% { stroke: #00ffff; }
}
@keyframes colorR2 {
  0%   { stroke: #aaff00; }
  25%  { stroke: #ff00aa; }
  50%  { stroke: #00aaff; }
  75%  { stroke: #ffaa00; }
  100% { stroke: #aaff00; }
}
@keyframes colorR1 {
  0%   { stroke: #ff00aa; }
  25%  { stroke: #aaff00; }
  50%  { stroke: #ffaa00; }
  75%  { stroke: #00aaff; }
  100% { stroke: #ff00aa; }
}

/* Shadow alternation sharp/diffuse via filter */
@keyframes shadowAlt {
  0%, 100% { filter: url(#sharp); }
  50%       { filter: url(#diffuse); }
}
@keyframes shadowAlt2 {
  0%, 100% { filter: url(#diffuse); }
  50%       { filter: url(#sharp); }
}

/* Iris pulsing clip-path effect */
@keyframes irisAnim {
  0%   { r: 25px; fill: #ff00ff; opacity: 1; }
  25%  { r: 8px;  fill: #00ffff; opacity: 0.6; }
  50%  { r: 28px; fill: #ff6600; opacity: 0.9; }
  75%  { r: 5px;  fill: #0066ff; opacity: 0.5; }
  100% { r: 25px; fill: #ff00ff; opacity: 1; }
}
</style>

An hourglass with falling sand particles that translate downward at staggered velocities while each grain's opacity fades and border-radius morphs from sharp to rounded mid-fall, shadows stretch vertically beneath each grain, and the hourglass frame's stroke-dasharray animates as a boundary outline while background-position scrolls upward simulating sand pile accumulation.

<svg viewBox="0 0 300 300" width="300" height="300" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg">
  <defs>
    <filter id="sandShadow">
      <feDropShadow dx="0" dy="0" stdDeviation="2" flood-color="rgba(180,120,40,0.4)"/>
    </filter>
    <!-- Animated vertical bg pattern to simulate sand pile -->
    <pattern id="sandPile" x="0" y="0" width="60" height="20" patternUnits="userSpaceOnUse">
      <rect width="60" height="20" fill="#c8963e"/>
      <ellipse cx="10" cy="15" rx="8" ry="3" fill="#b07d2a" opacity="0.5"/>
      <ellipse cx="30" cy="17" rx="10" ry="3" fill="#9a6820" opacity="0.4"/>
      <ellipse cx="50" cy="14" rx="7" ry="3" fill="#b07d2a" opacity="0.5"/>
    </pattern>
  </defs>

  <!-- Hourglass frame -->
  <g class="hourglass-frame">
    <!-- Top trapezoid outline -->
    <path class="hg-outline" d="M70,30 L230,30 L175,148 L125,148 Z" fill="none" stroke="#8B5E3C" stroke-width="3" stroke-dasharray="600"/>
    <!-- Bottom trapezoid outline -->
    <path class="hg-outline2" d="M125,152 L175,152 L230,270 L70,270 Z" fill="none" stroke="#8B5E3C" stroke-width="3" stroke-dasharray="600"/>
    <!-- Side supports -->
    <rect x="62" y="20" width="14" height="260" rx="5" fill="#6b4226"/>
    <rect x="224" y="20" width="14" height="260" rx="5" fill="#6b4226"/>
    <!-- Top cap -->
    <rect x="58" y="18" width="184" height="16" rx="6" fill="#5a3518"/>
    <!-- Bottom cap -->
    <rect x="58" y="266" width="184" height="16" rx="6" fill="#5a3518"/>
    <!-- Neck -->
    <rect x="143" y="143" width="14" height="14" rx="2" fill="#5a3518"/>
  </g>

  <!-- Sand pile fill bottom (animated bg-position via translateY) -->
  <clipPath id="bottomGlass">
    <path d="M126,153 L174,153 L229,268 L71,268 Z"/>
  </clipPath>
  <g clip-path="url(#bottomGlass)">
    <rect class="sand-pile" x="70" y="100" width="162" height="170" fill="url(#sandPile)"/>
  </g>

  <!-- Top glass sand fill -->
  <clipPath id="topGlass">
    <path d="M71,31 L229,31 L174,147 L126,147 Z"/>
  </clipPath>
  <g clip-path="url(#topGlass)">
    <rect class="sand-top" x="70" y="31" width="162" height="116" fill="#c8963e" opacity="0.6"/>
    <rect class="sand-top-level" x="70" y="31" width="162" height="30" fill="#b07d2a" opacity="0.4"/>
  </g>

  <!-- Sand grains falling -->
  <g class="grains" filter="url(#sandShadow)">
    <rect class="grain g1" x="148" y="148" width="4" height="4" rx="0" fill="#d4a843"/>
    <rect class="grain g2" x="152" y="148" width="3" height="3" rx="0" fill="#c8963e"/>
    <rect class="grain g3" x="145" y="148" width="5" height="4" rx="0" fill="#e0b050"/>
    <rect class="grain g4" x="150" y="148" width="4" height="3" rx="0" fill="#b88030"/>
    <rect class="grain g5" x="147" y="148" width="3" height="5" rx="0" fill="#d4a843"/>
    <rect class="grain g6" x="153" y="148" width="4" height="4" rx="0" fill="#c8963e"/>
    <rect class="grain g7" x="144" y="148" width="3" height="3" rx="0" fill="#e0b050"/>
    <rect class="grain g8" x="151" y="148" width="5" height="4" rx="0" fill="#b88030"/>
  </g>
</svg>

<style>
/* Hourglass outline dash animation */
.hg-outline {
  stroke-dashoffset: 600;
  animation: outlineDash 3s linear infinite;
}
.hg-outline2 {
  stroke-dashoffset: 0;
  animation: outlineDash2 3s linear infinite;
}
@keyframes outlineDash {
  0%   { stroke-dashoffset: 600; stroke: #8B5E3C; }
  50%  { stroke-dashoffset: 0;   stroke: #d4a843; }
  100% { stroke-dashoffset: -600; stroke: #8B5E3C; }
}
@keyframes outlineDash2 {
  0%   { stroke-dashoffset: 0;    stroke: #d4a843; }
  50%  { stroke-dashoffset: 600;  stroke: #8B5E3C; }
  100% { stroke-dashoffset: 1200; stroke: #d4a843; }
}

/* Sand pile scrolling upward (accumulating) */
.sand-pile {
  animation: pileUp 4s linear infinite;
}
@keyframes pileUp {
  0%   { transform: translateY(0); }
  100% { transform: translateY(-20px); }
}

/* Top sand draining */
.sand-top {
  animation: sandDrain 4s linear infinite;
  transform-origin: bottom center;
}
@keyframes sandDrain {
  0%   { transform: scaleY(1); opacity: 0.6; }
  100% { transform: scaleY(0.1); opacity: 0.2; }
}
.sand-top-level {
  animation: sandDrain 4s 0.5s linear infinite;
}

/* Individual grain falls */
.grain {
  transform-origin: center;
}
.g1 {
  animation: fall1 1.2s 0s ease-in infinite;
}
.g2 {
  animation: fall2 1.0s 0.15s ease-in infinite;
}
.g3 {
  animation: fall3 1.4s 0.3s ease-in infinite;
}
.g4 {
  animation: fall1 0.9s 0.45s ease-in infinite;
}
.g5 {
  animation: fall2 1.3s 0.6s ease-in infinite;
}
.g6 {
  animation: fall3 1.1s 0.75s ease-in infinite;
}
.g7 {
  animation: fall1 1.5s 0.9s ease-in infinite;
}
.g8 {
  animation: fall2 1.0s 1.05s ease-in infinite;
}

@keyframes fall1 {
  0%   { transform: translateY(0) translateX(0);
         opacity: 1; rx: 0; ry: 0;
         filter: drop-shadow(0px 0px 1px rgba(0,0,0,0.3)); }
  40%  { opacity: 0.9; rx: 1px; ry: 1px;
         filter: drop-shadow(0px 4px 2px rgba(0,0,0,0.4)); }
  80%  { transform: translateY(90px) translateX(-3px);
         opacity: 0.6; rx: 2px; ry: 2px;
         filter: drop-shadow(0px 12px 4px rgba(0,0,0,0.2)); }
  100% { transform: translateY(115px) translateX(-5px);
         opacity: 0;
         filter: drop-shadow(0px 18px 6px rgba(0,0,0,0.05)); }
}
@keyframes fall2 {
  0%   { transform: translateY(0) translateX(0);
         opacity: 1;
         filter: drop-shadow(0px 0px 1px rgba(0,0,0,0.3)); }
  50%  { opacity: 0.8;
         filter: drop-shadow(0px 6px 3px rgba(0,0,0,0.35)); }
  85%  { transform: translateY(80px) translateX(4px);
         opacity: 0.5;
         filter: drop-shadow(0px 14px 5px rgba(0,0,0,0.15)); }
  100% { transform: translateY(110px) translateX(6px);
         opacity: 0;
         filter: drop-shadow(0px 20px 7px rgba(0,0,0,0.05)); }
}
@keyframes fall3 {
  0%   { transform: translateY(0) translateX(0);
         opacity: 1;
         filter: drop-shadow(0px 0px 1px rgba(0,0,0,0.3)); }
  45%  { opacity: 0.85;
         filter: drop-shadow(0px 8px 3px rgba(0,0,0,0.38)); }
  90%  { transform: translateY(100px) translateX(2px);
         opacity: 0.4;
         filter: drop-shadow(0px 16px 5px rgba(0,0,0,0.12)); }
  100% { transform: translateY(120px) translateX(3px);
         opacity: 0;
         filter: drop-shadow(0px 22px 8px rgba(0,0,0,0.05)); }
}
</style>

A zigzag lightning bolt that skews between sharp left and right angles while its stroke-dasharray animates as a crackling pulse traveling along the arc, stroke-width modulates to suggest electrical intensity peaks, and stroke-color flashes white-to-purple-to-blue in rapid staggered bursts creating a jagged reveal-and-conceal effect.

<svg viewBox="0 0 300 300" width="300" height="300" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg">
  <defs>
    <filter id="glow1">
      <feGaussianBlur stdDeviation="4" result="blur"/>
      <feMerge><feMergeNode in="blur"/><feMergeNode in="SourceGraphic"/></feMerge>
    </filter>
    <filter id="glow2">
      <feGaussianBlur stdDeviation="8" result="blur"/>
      <feMerge><feMergeNode in="blur"/><feMergeNode in="SourceGraphic"/></feMerge>
    </filter>
  </defs>

  <!-- Background bolt glow layer -->
  <polyline class="bolt bolt-glow"
    points="150,20 115,100 155,100 100,185 148,185 90,280 165,180 118,180 175,95 135,95 168,20"
    fill="none" stroke-width="12" stroke-linejoin="round" stroke-linecap="round"/>

  <!-- Main bolt -->
  <polyline class="bolt bolt-main"
    points="150,20 115,100 155,100 100,185 148,185 90,280 165,180 118,180 175,95 135,95 168,20"
    fill="none" stroke-width="5" stroke-linejoin="round" stroke-linecap="round"/>

  <!-- Sharp inner bolt -->
  <polyline class="bolt bolt-inner"
    points="150,20 115,100 155,100 100,185 148,185 90,280 165,180 118,180 175,95 135,95 168,20"
    fill="none" stroke-width="2" stroke-linejoin="round" stroke-linecap="round"/>
</svg>

<style>
svg {
  background: #0a0010;
}

.bolt {
  /* Approximate path length ~660 */
  stroke-dasharray: 660;
}

.bolt-glow {
  stroke: #cc44ff;
  filter: url(#glow2);
  animation: crackleGlow 0.4s linear infinite, dashTravel 1.2s ease-in-out infinite, widthPulse 0.4s linear infinite, skewBolt 0.8s ease-in-out infinite;
}
.bolt-main {
  filter: url(#glow1);
  animation: crackleMain 0.4s 0.05s linear infinite, dashTravel2 1.2s 0.1s ease-in-out infinite, widthPulse2 0.4s 0.05s linear infinite, skewBolt 0.8s 0.1s ease-in-out infinite;
}
.bolt-inner {
  stroke: #ffffff;
  animation: crackleInner 0.4s 0.1s linear infinite, dashTravel 1.2s 0.2s ease-in-out infinite, skewBolt 0.8s 0.2s ease-in-out infinite;
}

/* Color flash: white → purple → blue */
@keyframes crackleGlow {
  0%   { stroke: #ffffff; opacity: 1; }
  15%  { stroke: #ee88ff; opacity: 0.9; }
  30%  { stroke: #aa22ff; opacity: 0.8; }
  50%  { stroke: #4400cc; opacity: 0.6; }
  65%  { stroke: #2244ff; opacity: 0.9; }
  80%  { stroke: #8800ff; opacity: 1; }
  100% { stroke: #ffffff; opacity: 0.7; }
}
@keyframes crackleMain {
  0%   { stroke: #ffffff; opacity: 1; }
  20%  { stroke: #dd66ff; opacity: 0.7; }
  40%  { stroke: #6600ff; opacity: 0.9; }
  60%  { stroke: #0044ff; opacity: 1; }
  80%  { stroke: #cc00ff; opacity: 0.8; }
  100% { stroke: #ffffff; opacity: 1; }
}
@keyframes crackleInner {
  0%   { stroke: #ffffff; opacity: 1; }
  25%  { stroke: #ffddff; opacity: 0.5; }
  50%  { stroke: #ffffff; opacity: 1; }
  75%  { stroke: #aaddff; opacity: 0.6; }
  100% { stroke: #ffffff; opacity: 1; }
}

/* Dash traveling along the path — crackling pulse */
@keyframes dashTravel {
  0%   { stroke-dashoffset: 1320; stroke-dasharray: 80 580; }
  20%  { stroke-dasharray: 120 540; }
  40%  { stroke-dashoffset: 660;  stroke-dasharray: 60 600; }
  60%  { stroke-dasharray: 200 460; }
  80%  { stroke-dashoffset: 200;  stroke-dasharray: 100 560; }
  100% { stroke-dashoffset: 0;    stroke-dasharray: 80 580; }
}
@keyframes dashTravel2 {
  0%   { stroke-dashoffset: 0;    stroke-dasharray: 150 510; }
  25%  { stroke-dasharray: 80 580; }
  50%  { stroke-dashoffset: -660; stroke-dasharray: 220 440; }
  75%  { stroke-dasharray: 100 560; }
  100% { stroke-dashoffset: -1320; stroke-dasharray: 150 510; }
}

/* Stroke-width modulation for intensity peaks */
@keyframes widthPulse {
  0%   { stroke-width: 10; }
  15%  { stroke-width: 18; }
  30%  { stroke-width: 8; }
  50%  { stroke-width: 22; }
  70%  { stroke-width: 6; }
  85%  { stroke-width: 16; }
  100% { stroke-width: 10; }
}
@keyframes widthPulse2 {
  0%   { stroke-width: 5; }
  20%  { stroke-width: 9; }
  40%  { stroke-width: 3; }
  60%  { stroke-width: 11; }
  80%  { stroke-width: 4; }
  100% { stroke-width: 5; }
}

/* Skew between sharp left and right */
@keyframes skewBolt {
  0%   { transform: skewX(0deg)  skewY(0deg); }
  15%  { transform: skewX(-8deg) skewY(2deg); }
  30%  { transform: skewX(6deg)  skewY(-1deg); }
  45%  { transform: skewX(-10deg) skewY(3deg); }
  60%  { transform: skewX(9deg)  skewY(-2deg); }
  75%  { transform: skewX(-5deg) skewY(1deg); }
  90%  { transform: skewX(7deg)  skewY(-1deg); }
  100% { transform: skewX(0deg)  skewY(0deg); }
}
</style>

A parallelogram that rotates while skewing on the X-axis in synchronized phases, its border-radius morphs from sharp corners to gently rounded as skew intensifies, stroke animates as a color gradient flowing around the perimeter, and layered shadows cast at increasing angles to emphasize perspective distortion.

A skewed parallelogram that translates diagonally while simultaneously skewing at increasing intensity, its stroke-dasharray chases along the shape boundary in reverse direction on alternate phases, stroke-color fades from opaque magenta to transparent, and the shadow stretches perpendicular to motion then compresses.

<svg viewBox="0 0 300 300" width="300" height="300" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg">
  <defs>
    <filter id="pshadow">
      <feDropShadow class="dshadow" dx="0" dy="6" stdDeviation="4" flood-color="rgba(255,0,200,0.5)"/>
    </filter>
  </defs>

  <!-- Shadow shape -->
  <parallelogram>
  </parallelogram>

  <!-- Main skewed parallelogram via polygon -->
  <g class="para-group" filter="url(#pshadow)">
    <polygon class="para-shadow"
      points="80,200 200,200 220,240 100,240"
      fill="rgba(255,0,180,0.2)"/>
    <polygon class="para-shape"
      points="80,130 200,130 220,170 100,170"
      fill="none"
      stroke="#ff00cc"
      stroke-width="3"
      stroke-dasharray="400"
      stroke-dashoffset="0"/>
    <polygon class="para-fill"
      points="80,130 200,130 220,170 100,170"
      fill="rgba(255,0,200,0.15)"/>
  </g>
</svg>

<style>
svg { background: #08000e; }

.para-group {
  animation: diagTranslate 3s ease-in-out infinite, skewIntensify 3s ease-in-out infinite;
  transform-origin: 150px 150px;
}

.para-shape {
  animation: dashChase 3s ease-in-out infinite, strokeFade 3s ease-in-out infinite;
}

.para-shadow {
  animation: shadowStretch 3s ease-in-out infinite;
  transform-origin: 150px 240px;
}

/* Diagonal translation */
@keyframes diagTranslate {
  0%   { transform: translate(0px, 0px)    skewX(0deg); }
  20%  { transform: translate(20px, -20px) skewX(8deg); }
  40%  { transform: translate(40px, -40px) skewX(18deg); }
  55%  { transform: translate(55px, -55px) skewX(28deg); }
  70%  { transform: translate(30px, -30px) skewX(18deg); }
  85%  { transform: translate(15px, -15px) skewX(8deg); }
  100% { transform: translate(0px, 0px)    skewX(0deg); }
}

/* Skew intensifies as it translates */
@keyframes skewIntensify {
  0%   { filter: url(#pshadow) drop-shadow(0px 4px 3px rgba(255,0,200,0.4)); }
  40%  { filter: url(#pshadow) drop-shadow(0px 10px 6px rgba(255,0,200,0.7)); }
  55%  { filter: url(#pshadow) drop-shadow(0px 16px 10px rgba(255,0,200,0.9)); }
  100% { filter: url(#pshadow) drop-shadow(0px 4px 3px rgba(255,0,200,0.4)); }
}

/* Dash chasing in reverse on alternate phases */
@keyframes dashChase {
  0%   { stroke-dashoffset: 0;    stroke-dasharray: 120 280; stroke-width: 3; }
  25%  { stroke-dashoffset: -100; stroke-dasharray: 80 320;  stroke-width: 4; }
  50%  { stroke-dashoffset: -400; stroke-dasharray: 200 200; stroke-width: 5; }
  /* Reverse direction */
  55%  { stroke-dashoffset: -400; stroke-dasharray: 150 250; stroke-width: 4; }
  75%  { stroke-dashoffset: -200; stroke-dasharray: 100 300; stroke-width: 3.5; }
  100% { stroke-dashoffset: 0;    stroke-dasharray: 120 280; stroke-width: 3; }
}

/* Stroke fades from opaque magenta to transparent */
@keyframes strokeFade {
  0%   { stroke: rgba(255,0,204,1);   }
  30%  { stroke: rgba(255,0,204,0.8); }
  55%  { stroke: rgba(255,0,204,0.2); }
  70%  { stroke: rgba(255,80,220,0.6); }
  85%  { stroke: rgba(255,0,204,0.9); }
  100% { stroke: rgba(255,0,204,1);   }
}

/* Shadow stretches perpendicular to motion then compresses */
@keyframes shadowStretch {
  0%   { transform: scaleX(1)    scaleY(1)    translateY(0px);  opacity: 0.3; }
  25%  { transform: scaleX(1.15) scaleY(0.8)  translateY(4px);  opacity: 0.45; }
  55%  { transform: scaleX(1.4)  scaleY(0.4)  translateY(12px); opacity: 0.6; }
  75%  { transform: scaleX(1.2)  scaleY(0.6)  translateY(6px);  opacity: 0.4; }
  100% { transform: scaleX(1)    scaleY(1)    translateY(0px);  opacity: 0.3; }
}
</style>

A skew-morphing hexagon that transforms through six phases while rotating slowly, border-radius on alternating vertices rounds from sharp to bulbous in staggered cycles, the stroke animates as a color gradient flowing around the perimeter in opposing directions, and an inner shadow intensifies then lightens at each transformation phase.

<svg viewBox="0 0 300 300" width="300" height="300" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg">
  <defs>
    <linearGradient id="strokeGrad1" x1="0%" y1="0%" x2="100%" y2="100%">
      <stop offset="0%" stop-color="#ff6b6b"><animate attributeName="stop-color" values="#ff6b6b;#ffd93d;#6bcb77;#4d96ff;#c77dff;#ff6b6b" dur="4s" repeatCount="indefinite"/></stop>
      <stop offset="50%" stop-color="#4d96ff"><animate attributeName="stop-color" values="#4d96ff;#c77dff;#ff6b6b;#ffd93d;#6bcb77;#4d96ff" dur="4s" repeatCount="indefinite"/></stop>
      <stop offset="100%" stop-color="#6bcb77"><animate attributeName="stop-color" values="#6bcb77;#4d96ff;#c77dff;#ff6b6b;#ffd93d;#6bcb77" dur="4s" repeatCount="indefinite"/></stop>
    </linearGradient>
    <filter id="innerShadow">
      <feGaussianBlur in="SourceAlpha" stdDeviation="4" result="blur"/>
      <feOffset dx="0" dy="0" result="offsetBlur"/>
      <feComposite in="offsetBlur" in2="SourceGraphic" operator="in" result="shadow"/>
      <feComponentTransfer in="shadow">
        <feFuncA type="linear"><animate attributeName="slope" values="0.3;1;0.3;1;0.3;1;0.3" dur="4s" repeatCount="indefinite"/></feFuncA>
      </feComponentTransfer>
      <feMerge><feMergeNode/><feMergeNode in="SourceGraphic"/></feMerge>
    </filter>
    <filter id="glow">
      <feGaussianBlur stdDeviation="3" result="coloredBlur"/>
      <feMerge><feMergeNode in="coloredBlur"/><feMergeNode in="SourceGraphic"/></feMerge>
    </filter>
  </defs>
  <g transform="translate(150,150)">
    <polygon class="hex-shape" points="0,-80 69,-40 69,40 0,80 -69,40 -69,-40" filter="url(#innerShadow)"/>
    <polygon class="hex-stroke" points="0,-80 69,-40 69,40 0,80 -69,40 -69,-40"/>
  </g>
</svg>
<style>
.hex-shape {
  fill: rgba(80,40,120,0.18);
  animation: hexMorph 4s ease-in-out infinite, hexRotate 12s linear infinite;
  transform-origin: center;
  filter: url(#innerShadow);
}
.hex-stroke {
  fill: none;
  stroke: url(#strokeGrad1);
  stroke-width: 3.5;
  stroke-linejoin: round;
  stroke-dasharray: 480;
  animation: hexRotate 12s linear infinite, strokeFlow 4s linear infinite, hexMorph 4s ease-in-out infinite;
  transform-origin: center;
  filter: url(#glow);
}
@keyframes hexMorph {
  0%   { d: path("M0,-80 L69,-40 L69,40 L0,80 L-69,40 L-69,-40 Z"); rx: 0; }
  16%  { points: "10,-75 75,-30 65,45 -5,82 -72,38 -66,-44"; }
  33%  { points: "0,-90 75,-35 72,38 0,88 -72,38 -75,-35"; }
  50%  { points: "-8,-78 72,-42 74,36 6,84 -70,40 -72,-38"; }
  66%  { points: "5,-85 68,-38 71,42 -3,86 -74,36 -68,-46"; }
  83%  { points: "0,-80 72,-38 66,44 2,80 -68,42 -72,-36"; }
  100% { points: "0,-80 69,-40 69,40 0,80 -69,40 -69,-40"; }
}
@keyframes hexRotate {
  from { transform: rotate(0deg) skewX(0deg); }
  16%  { transform: rotate(60deg) skewX(8deg); }
  33%  { transform: rotate(120deg) skewX(-5deg); }
  50%  { transform: rotate(180deg) skewX(10deg); }
  66%  { transform: rotate(240deg) skewX(-8deg); }
  83%  { transform: rotate(300deg) skewX(5deg); }
  to   { transform: rotate(360deg) skewX(0deg); }
}
@keyframes strokeFlow {
  0%   { stroke-dashoffset: 0; }
  50%  { stroke-dashoffset: -480; }
  100% { stroke-dashoffset: -960; }
}
</style>

Two parallelograms that skew in mirror directions while their combined clip-path creates a diamond aperture that shrinks then expands, the aperture's border-radius morphs from sharp to rounded creating a pulsing iris effect, and shadows cast inward then outward emphasize the clipping depth.

A paper airplane silhouette that skews on alternate axes to simulate banking turns while translating along a curved arc, the fuselage's stroke-dasharray animates as if wind-peeling the outline in staggered phases, clip-path narrows and widens the fuselage with each turn, and the shadow stretches at sharp angles then compresses.

<svg viewBox="0 0 300 300" width="300" height="300" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg">
  <defs>
    <filter id="planeShadow">
      <feDropShadow dx="0" dy="0" stdDeviation="3" flood-color="#334" flood-opacity="0.6">
        <animate attributeName="dx" values="3;-8;12;-5;3" dur="5s" repeatCount="indefinite"/>
        <animate attributeName="dy" values="2;8;-3;10;2" dur="5s" repeatCount="indefinite"/>
        <animate attributeName="stdDeviation" values="3;8;2;10;3" dur="5s" repeatCount="indefinite"/>
      </feDropShadow>
    </filter>
    <clipPath id="fuseClip">
      <rect x="-55" y="-22" width="110" height="44">
        <animate attributeName="width" values="110;70;110;85;110" dur="5s" repeatCount="indefinite"/>
        <animate attributeName="x" values="-55;-35;-55;-42;-55" dur="5s" repeatCount="indefinite"/>
      </rect>
    </clipPath>
  </defs>
  <g class="plane-group">
    <g class="plane-body" filter="url(#planeShadow)">
      <polygon class="fuselage" points="55,0 -40,-14 -55,0 -40,14" clip-path="url(#fuseClip)"/>
      <polygon class="wing-top" points="10,-2 -20,-2 -35,-28 -15,-20"/>
      <polygon class="wing-bot" points="10,2 -20,2 -35,28 -15,20"/>
      <polygon class="tail-top" points="-38,-12 -55,-12 -55,-2 -42,-2"/>
      <polygon class="tail-bot" points="-38,12 -55,12 -55,2 -42,2"/>
    </g>
    <g class="plane-stroke" filter="url(#planeShadow)">
      <polygon class="fuse-stroke" points="55,0 -40,-14 -55,0 -40,14"/>
    </g>
  </g>
</svg>
<style>
.plane-group {
  animation: planeArc 5s ease-in-out infinite;
  transform-origin: 150px 150px;
}
.plane-body {
  transform: translate(150px, 150px);
  animation: planeBank 5s ease-in-out infinite;
  transform-origin: 0px 0px;
}
.fuselage {
  fill: #c8d8e8;
  stroke: none;
}
.wing-top, .wing-bot {
  fill: #a0b8d0;
}
.tail-top, .tail-bot {
  fill: #90a8c0;
}
.fuse-stroke {
  fill: none;
  stroke: #446688;
  stroke-width: 1.5;
  stroke-dasharray: 200;
  stroke-dashoffset: 0;
  transform: translate(150px, 150px);
  animation: planeBank 5s ease-in-out infinite, strokePeel 5s linear infinite;
  transform-origin: 0px 0px;
}
@keyframes planeArc {
  0%   { transform: translate(0px, 20px); }
  12%  { transform: translate(20px, -15px) rotate(15deg); }
  25%  { transform: translate(40px, 10px) rotate(-8deg); }
  37%  { transform: translate(20px, 30px) rotate(20deg); }
  50%  { transform: translate(0px, -10px) rotate(-12deg); }
  62%  { transform: translate(-20px, 15px) rotate(10deg); }
  75%  { transform: translate(-40px, -5px) rotate(-18deg); }
  87%  { transform: translate(-20px, 25px) rotate(14deg); }
  100% { transform: translate(0px, 20px); }
}
@keyframes planeBank {
  0%   { transform: translate(150px,150px) skewX(0deg) skewY(0deg); }
  12%  { transform: translate(150px,150px) skewX(-12deg) skewY(4deg); }
  25%  { transform: translate(150px,150px) skewX(8deg) skewY(-3deg); }
  37%  { transform: translate(150px,150px) skewX(-18deg) skewY(6deg); }
  50%  { transform: translate(150px,150px) skewX(10deg) skewY(-4deg); }
  62%  { transform: translate(150px,150px) skewX(-8deg) skewY(3deg); }
  75%  { transform: translate(150px,150px) skewX(15deg) skewY(-5deg); }
  87%  { transform: translate(150px,150px) skewX(-10deg) skewY(4deg); }
  100% { transform: translate(150px,150px) skewX(0deg) skewY(0deg); }
}
@keyframes strokePeel {
  0%   { stroke-dashoffset: 0; stroke: #446688; }
  20%  { stroke-dashoffset: -60; stroke: #8844aa; }
  40%  { stroke-dashoffset: -120; stroke: #44aa88; }
  60%  { stroke-dashoffset: -80; stroke: #aa8844; }
  80%  { stroke-dashoffset: -160; stroke: #4488aa; }
  100% { stroke-dashoffset: -200; stroke: #446688; }
}
</style>

A pulsating membrane where the central shape scales up and down while its border-radius cycles from sharp (10%) to bulbous (50%) in perfect sync, the outer glow's stroke-width pulses inversely to scale (thin on expand, thick on contract), stroke-color brightens on expansion then darkens on contraction through a neon-white-to-pale gradient, and layered shadows grow and shrink to emphasize breathing three-dimensional depth.

A spinning aperture iris where four concentric rings rotate in opposite directions while counter-scaling (outer expands as inner shrinks), each ring's stroke-dasharray animates in opposing directions at staggered speeds offset by 150ms, stroke-color sequences through complementary cyan-magenta-yellow gradient pairs, inner shadows alternate between sharp focus and soft blur in sync with border-radius morphing from sharp (5%) to rounded (40%), and the central clip-path creates a pulsing aperture effect.

<svg viewBox="0 0 300 300" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="300" height="300">
  <defs>
    <filter id="blur4a"><feGaussianBlur stdDeviation="1"/></filter>
    <filter id="blur4b"><feGaussianBlur stdDeviation="4"/></filter>
    <clipPath id="apertureClip">
      <circle class="aperture-clip" cx="150" cy="150" r="30"/>
    </clipPath>
  </defs>
  <circle class="ring r4" cx="150" cy="150" r="120" fill="none"/>
  <circle class="ring r3" cx="150" cy="150" r="88"  fill="none"/>
  <circle class="ring r2" cx="150" cy="150" r="58"  fill="none"/>
  <circle class="ring r1" cx="150" cy="150" r="30"  fill="none"/>
  <circle class="aperture-center" cx="150" cy="150" r="22"/>
</svg>
<style>
.ring {
  stroke-linecap: round;
  transform-origin: 150px 150px;
}

.r4 {
  stroke: #00ffff;
  stroke-width: 6;
  stroke-dasharray: 60 16;
  animation: spinCW 3s linear infinite, r4dash 3s ease-in-out infinite, r4color 6s linear infinite;
  filter: url(#blur4a);
}
.r3 {
  stroke: #ff00ff;
  stroke-width: 5;
  stroke-dasharray: 44 14;
  animation: spinCCW 2.5s linear infinite, r3dash 2.5s ease-in-out infinite, r3color 6s linear infinite;
  animation-delay: 0s, 150ms, 0s;
}
.r2 {
  stroke: #ffff00;
  stroke-width: 4;
  stroke-dasharray: 30 10;
  animation: spinCW 2s linear infinite, r2dash 2s ease-in-out infinite, r2color 6s linear infinite;
  animation-delay: 0s, 300ms, 0s;
}
.r1 {
  stroke: #00ffff;
  stroke-width: 3;
  stroke-dasharray: 18 8;
  animation: spinCCW 1.5s linear infinite, r1dash 1.5s ease-in-out infinite, r1color 6s linear infinite;
  animation-delay: 0s, 450ms, 0s;
  filter: url(#blur4b);
}

.aperture-center {
  fill: none;
  stroke: #ffffff;
  stroke-width: 2;
  animation: aperturePulse 2s ease-in-out infinite;
}

@keyframes spinCW {
  from { transform: rotate(0deg); }
  to   { transform: rotate(360deg); }
}
@keyframes spinCCW {
  from { transform: rotate(0deg); }
  to   { transform: rotate(-360deg); }
}

@keyframes r4dash {
  0%   { stroke-dasharray: 60 16;  stroke-width: 6;  r: 115; filter: url(#blur4a); }
  50%  { stroke-dasharray: 30 46;  stroke-width: 10; r: 125; filter: url(#blur4b); }
  100% { stroke-dasharray: 60 16;  stroke-width: 6;  r: 115; filter: url(#blur4a); }
}
@keyframes r3dash {
  0%   { stroke-dasharray: 44 14;  stroke-width: 5;  r: 84;  }
  50%  { stroke-dasharray: 22 36;  stroke-width: 8;  r: 92;  }
  100% { stroke-dasharray: 44 14;  stroke-width: 5;  r: 84;  }
}
@keyframes r2dash {
  0%   { stroke-dasharray: 30 10;  stroke-width: 4;  r: 55;  }
  50%  { stroke-dasharray: 15 25;  stroke-width: 7;  r: 62;  }
  100% { stroke-dasharray: 30 10;  stroke-width: 4;  r: 55;  }
}
@keyframes r1dash {
  0%   { stroke-dasharray: 18 8;   stroke-width: 3;  r: 26;  filter: url(#blur4b); }
  50%  { stroke-dasharray: 8 18;   stroke-width: 6;  r: 34;  filter: url(#blur4a); }
  100% { stroke-dasharray: 18 8;   stroke-width: 3;  r: 26;  filter: url(#blur4b); }
}

@keyframes r4color {
  0%   { stroke: #00ffff; }
  33%  { stroke: #ff00ff; }
  66%  { stroke: #ffff00; }
  100% { stroke: #00ffff; }
}
@keyframes r3color {
  0%   { stroke: #ff00ff; }
  33%  { stroke: #ffff00; }
  66%  { stroke: #00ffff; }
  100% { stroke: #ff00ff; }
}
@keyframes r2color {
  0%   { stroke: #ffff00; }
  33%  { stroke: #00ffff; }
  66%  { stroke: #ff00ff; }
  100% { stroke: #ffff00; }
}
@keyframes r1color {
  0%   { stroke: #00ffcc; }
  33%  { stroke: #ff00aa; }
  66%  { stroke: #ccff00; }
  100% { stroke: #00ffcc; }
}

@keyframes aperturePulse {
  0%   { r: 22; stroke-width: 2; stroke: #ffffff; opacity: 1;   }
  25%  { r: 14; stroke-width: 3; stroke: #aaffff; opacity: 0.8; }
  50%  { r: 8;  stroke-width: 5; stroke: #00ffff; opacity: 0.6; }
  75%  { r: 14; stroke-width: 3; stroke: #aaffff; opacity: 0.8; }
  100% { r: 22; stroke-width: 2; stroke: #ffffff; opacity: 1;   }
}
</style>

A paper airplane that translates upward along a curved arc while rotating on three axes simultaneously, its fuselage stroke-dasharray animates as if wind-peeling the outline backward at a 150ms lag behind the head's movement, the plane's clip-path narrows and widens to simulate banking turns, the shadow beneath stretches at sharp angles during turns then compresses in straight flight, and the background-position shifts to create wind-swept depth parallax.

<svg viewBox="0 0 300 300" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="300" height="300">
  <defs>
    <filter id="shadowF">
      <feDropShadow class="plane-shadow-fe" dx="0" dy="8" stdDeviation="3" flood-color="#00000055"/>
    </filter>
    <linearGradient id="skyGrad" x1="0" y1="0" x2="0" y2="1">
      <stop offset="0%" stop-color="#c8e8ff"/>
      <stop offset="100%" stop-color="#eef8ff"/>
    </linearGradient>
    <clipPath id="planeClip">
      <polygon class="plane-clip-poly" points="150,60 210,130 150,110 90,130"/>
    </clipPath>
  </defs>

  <!-- Parallax wind lines -->
  <g class="wind-lines">
    <line class="wl w1" x1="20" y1="80"  x2="80"  y2="80"/>
    <line class="wl w2" x1="10" y1="130" x2="60"  y2="130"/>
    <line class="wl w3" x1="230" y1="100" x2="290" y2="100"/>
    <line class="wl w4" x1="240" y1="160" x2="280" y2="160"/>
    <line class="wl w5" x1="15" y1="180" x2="55" y2="180"/>
  </g>

  <!-- Shadow on ground -->
  <ellipse class="plane-ground-shadow" cx="150" cy="248" rx="28" ry="7"/>

  <!-- Plane group -->
  <g class="plane-group" filter="url(#shadowF)">
    <!-- Fuselage outline -->
    <path class="fuselage"
      d="M150,72 L185,118 L165,122 L150,118 L135,122 L115,118 Z"
      fill="#e8f4ff" stroke="#3366cc" stroke-linejoin="round"/>
    <!-- Wing left -->
    <path class="wing-left"
      d="M150,100 L90,128 L118,115 Z"
      fill="#cce0ff" stroke="#3366cc"/>
    <!-- Wing right -->
    <path class="wing-right"
      d="M150,100 L210,128 L182,115 Z"
      fill="#cce0ff" stroke="#3366cc"/>
    <!-- Tail fin -->
    <path class="tail"
      d="M148,115 L140,130 L160,130 L152,115 Z"
      fill="#bbccff" stroke="#3366cc"/>
    <!-- Nose -->
    <circle cx="150" cy="74" r="4" fill="#3366cc"/>
  </g>
</svg>

<style>
.plane-group {
  transform-origin: 150px 110px;
  animation: planefly 4s cubic-bezier(0.4,0,0.6,1) infinite;
}

@keyframes planefly {
  0%   { transform: translateX(0px)   translateY(20px)  rotate(0deg)   rotateX(0deg)  rotateY(0deg); }
  15%  { transform: translateX(18px)  translateY(0px)   rotate(8deg)   rotateX(5deg)  rotateY(15deg); }
  30%  { transform: translateX(10px)  translateY(-30px) rotate(3deg)   rotateX(10deg) rotateY(5deg); }
  45%  { transform: translateX(-15px) translateY(-50px) rotate(-10deg) rotateX(8deg)  rotateY(-20deg); }
  60%  { transform: translateX(-20px) translateY(-35px) rotate(-6deg)  rotateX(4deg)  rotateY(-10deg); }
  75%  { transform: translateX(5px)   translateY(-20px) rotate(4deg)   rotateX(6deg)  rotateY(10deg); }
  90%  { transform: translateX(15px)  translateY(5px)   rotate(7deg)   rotateX(2deg)  rotateY(12deg); }
  100% { transform: translateX(0px)   translateY(20px)  rotate(0deg)   rotateX(0deg)  rotateY(0deg); }
}

.fuselage {
  stroke-dasharray: 240;
  stroke-dashoffset: 0;
  animation: fuselageStroke 4s ease-in-out infinite;
  animation-delay: 150ms;
}

@keyframes fuselageStroke {
  0%   { stroke-dashoffset: 0;   stroke: #3366cc; stroke-width: 1.5; }
  20%  { stroke-dashoffset: 40;  stroke: #6699ff; stroke-width: 2;   }
  40%  { stroke-dashoffset: 90;  stroke: #99bbff; stroke-width: 1;   }
  60%  { stroke-dashoffset: 60;  stroke: #6699ff; stroke-width: 2;   }
  80%  { stroke-dashoffset: 30;  stroke: #3366cc; stroke-width: 1.8; }
  100% { stroke-dashoffset: 0;   stroke: #3366cc; stroke-width: 1.5; }
}

.wing-left, .wing-right {
  animation: wingBank 4s ease-in-out infinite;
}

@keyframes wingBank {
  0%   { transform: scaleX(1)    scaleY(1);   }
  15%  { transform: scaleX(1.12) scaleY(0.88); }
  30%  { transform: scaleX(1.05) scaleY(1.05); }
  45%  { transform: scaleX(0.85) scaleY(1.12); }
  60%  { transform: scaleX(0.9)  scaleY(1.08); }
  75%  { transform: scaleX(1.08) scaleY(0.94); }
  100% { transform: scaleX(1)    scaleY(1);   }
}

.plane-ground-shadow {
  fill: #00000033;
  transform-origin: 150px 248px;
  animation: shadowStretch 4s ease-in-out infinite;
}

@keyframes shadowStretch {
  0%   { transform: scaleX(1)   scaleY(1)   translateY(0px);  opacity: 0.5; }
  15%  { transform: scaleX(1.6) scaleY(0.5) translateY(2px);  opacity: 0.35; }
  30%  { transform: scaleX(0.8) scaleY(0.6) translateY(4px);  opacity: 0.25; }
  45%  { transform: scaleX(1.8) scaleY(0.4) translateY(6px);  opacity: 0.2; }
  60%  { transform: scaleX(1.4) scaleY(0.5) translateY(4px);  opacity: 0.28; }
  75%  { transform: scaleX(1.5) scaleY(0.6) translateY(2px);  opacity: 0.35; }
  90%  { transform: scaleX(1.2) scaleY(0.8) translateY(1px);  opacity: 0.45; }
  100% { transform: scaleX(1)   scaleY(1)   translateY(0px);  opacity: 0.5; }
}

.wl {
  stroke-linecap: round;
  stroke-width: 2;
  opacity: 0.5;
}
.w1 { stroke: #aaccff; animation: windLine 4s ease-in-out infinite; animation-delay: 0ms; }
.w2 { stroke: #99bbff; animation: windLine 4s ease-in-out infinite; animation-delay: 300ms; }
.w3 { stroke: #aaccff; animation: windLineR 4s ease-in-out infinite; animation-delay: 150ms; }
.w4 { stroke: #99bbff; animation: windLineR 4s ease-in-out infinite; animation-delay: 450ms; }
.w5 { stroke: #aaccff; animation: windLine 4s ease-in-out infinite; animation-delay: 600ms; }

@keyframes windLine {
  0%   { transform: translateX(0px);  opacity: 0.5; stroke-width: 1.5; }
  30%  { transform: translateX(-15px); opacity: 0.8; stroke-width: 2.5; }
  60%  { transform: translateX(-8px);  opacity: 0.6; stroke-width: 2; }
  80%  { transform: translateX(-20px); opacity: 0.9; stroke-width: 3; }
  100% { transform: translateX(0px);  opacity: 0.5; stroke-width: 1.5; }
}
@keyframes windLineR {
  0%   { transform: translateX(0px);   opacity: 0.5; stroke-width: 1.5; }
  30%  { transform: translateX(15px);  opacity: 0.8; stroke-width: 2.5; }
  60%  { transform: translateX(8px);   opacity: 0.6; stroke-width: 2; }
  80%  { transform: translateX(20px);  opacity: 0.9; stroke-width: 3; }
  100% { transform: translateX(0px);   opacity: 0.5; stroke-width: 1.5; }
}
</style>

An interlocking gear mechanism where the primary gear rotates clockwise while two secondary gears counter-rotate at staggered speeds (primary: 360deg in 3s, secondaries: 360deg in 4s each, offset by 400ms), each gear's stroke-width modulates inversely with rotation speed, stroke-color cycles through complementary gold-and-purple pairs offset by 200ms per gear, and skewed perspective shadows shift angle beneath each gear to exaggerate mechanical three-dimensional interlocking engagement.

<svg viewBox="0 0 300 300" width="300" height="300" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg">

    <rect x="86" y="171" width="14" height="8" rx="2" fill="#7b2d8b" class="tooth-sec1" transform="rotate(45 78 195)"/>
    <rect x="56" y="211" width="14" height="8" rx="2" fill="#7b2d8b" class="tooth-sec1" transform="rotate(45 78 195)"/>
    <rect x="86" y="211" width="14" height="8" rx="2" fill="#7b2d8b" class="tooth-sec1" transform="rotate(45 78 195)"/>

  <!-- Secondary Gear Right -->
  <g class="gear-sec2" transform-origin="222 195">

    <rect x="218" y="163" width="8" height="14" rx="2" fill="#7b2d8b" class="tooth-sec2"/>
    <rect x="218" y="218" width="8" height="14" rx="2" fill="#7b2d8b" class="tooth-sec2"/>

    <rect x="240" y="191" width="14" height="8" rx="2" fill="#7b2d8b" class="tooth-sec2"/>

<style>
.gear-primary { animation: rotPrimary 3s linear infinite; }
.gear-sec1    { animation: rotSec1 4s linear infinite; }
.gear-sec2    { animation: rotSec2 4s linear infinite 0.4s; }

@keyframes rotPrimary {
  from { transform: rotate(0deg); }
  to   { transform: rotate(360deg); }
}
@keyframes rotSec1 {
  from { transform: rotate(0deg); }
  to   { transform: rotate(-360deg); }
}
@keyframes rotSec2 {
  from { transform: rotate(0deg); }

}

.gear-ring-primary {
  animation: strokePrimary 3s linear infinite;
}
@keyframes strokePrimary {
  0%   { stroke: #c9a227; stroke-width: 9; }
  25%  { stroke: #7b2d8b; stroke-width: 6; }
  50%  { stroke: #c9a227; stroke-width: 9; }
  75%  { stroke: #7b2d8b; stroke-width: 6; }
  100% { stroke: #c9a227; stroke-width: 9; }
}

.gear-ring-sec1 {
  animation: strokeSec1 4s linear infinite;
}
@keyframes strokeSec1 {
  0%   { stroke: #7b2d8b; stroke-width: 7; }
  25%  { stroke: #c9a227; stroke-width: 5; }
  50%  { stroke: #7b2d8b; stroke-width: 7; }
  75%  { stroke: #c9a227; stroke-width: 5; }
  100% { stroke: #7b2d8b; stroke-width: 7; }
}

.gear-ring-sec2 {
  animation: strokeSec2 4s linear infinite 0.2s;
}
@keyframes strokeSec2 {
  0%   { stroke: #c9a227; stroke-width: 5; }
  25%  { stroke: #7b2d8b; stroke-width: 7; }
  50%  { stroke: #c9a227; stroke-width: 5; }
  75%  { stroke: #7b2d8b; stroke-width: 7; }
  100% { stroke: #c9a227; stroke-width: 5; }
}

/* Perspective shadow shift under primary gear */
.shadow-primary {
  animation: shadowP 3s linear infinite;
  transform-origin: 150px 268px;
}
@keyframes shadowP {
  0%   { transform: translateX(0px) scaleX(1);   opacity: 0.18; }
  25%  { transform: translateX(10px) scaleX(1.2); opacity: 0.12; }
  50%  { transform: translateX(0px) scaleX(0.85); opacity: 0.22; }
  75%  { transform: translateX(-10px) scaleX(1.2); opacity: 0.12; }
  100% { transform: translateX(0px) scaleX(1);   opacity: 0.18; }
}

.shadow-sec1 {
  animation: shadowS1 4s linear infinite;
  transform-origin: 86px 232px;
}
@keyframes shadowS1 {
  0%   { transform: translateX(0px) scaleX(1);   opacity: 0.13; }
  25%  { transform: translateX(-7px) scaleX(1.15); opacity: 0.08; }
  50%  { transform: translateX(0px) scaleX(0.85); opacity: 0.17; }
  75%  { transform: translateX(7px) scaleX(1.15); opacity: 0.08; }
  100% { transform: translateX(0px) scaleX(1);   opacity: 0.13; }
}

.shadow-sec2 {
  animation: shadowS2 4s linear infinite 0.4s;
  transform-origin: 214px 232px;
}
@keyframes shadowS2 {

  25%  { transform: translateX(7px) scaleX(1.15); opacity: 0.08; }
  50%  { transform: translateX(0px) scaleX(0.85); opacity: 0.17; }
  75%  { transform: translateX(-7px) scaleX(1.15); opacity: 0.08; }

}
</style>

A rotating prismatic wedge that skews horizontally while its scale increases and decreases, the wedge's front face border-radius morphs from sharp to rounded, stroke-color transitions through spectral gradient (violet-indigo-blue-cyan-green-yellow-red) in sync with rotation phases, and shadows shift angle beneath the wedge suggesting three-dimensional perspective depth as scale and skew transform.

An expanding spiral rotating clockwise while its stroke-dasharray accelerates then decelerates in a breathing four-phase rhythm (80ms-fast, 40ms-slow, 80ms-fast, 60ms-medium), stroke-color gradually shifts from cool blue through turquoise to warm orange across full 3-second cycle, the spiral's intersecting curves morph border-radius from 0% sharp edges to 15% gently-rounded creating organic fluidity, and a concentric shadow radiates outward then contracts suggesting helical three-dimensional coiling depth.

<svg viewBox="0 0 300 300" width="300" height="300" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg">
  <defs>
    <filter id="spiralShadow">
      <feGaussianBlur in="SourceAlpha" stdDeviation="6" result="blur"/>
      <feOffset dx="0" dy="0" result="offset"/>
      <feMerge><feMergeNode in="offset"/><feMergeNode in="SourceGraphic"/></feMerge>
    </filter>
    <radialGradient id="shadowGrad" cx="50%" cy="50%" r="50%">
      <stop offset="0%" stop-color="rgba(0,0,0,0.3)"/>
      <stop offset="100%" stop-color="rgba(0,0,0,0)"/>
    </radialGradient>
  </defs>

  <!-- Concentric shadow -->
  <ellipse cx="150" cy="150" rx="90" ry="90" fill="url(#shadowGrad)" class="spiral-shadow"/>

  <!-- Spiral path approximated with multiple arcs -->
  <g class="spiral-group" filter="url(#spiralShadow)">
    <!-- Spiral: 5 turns approximated with concentric partial circles -->
    <path class="spiral-path"
      d="M150,150
         m0,-20 a20,20 0 1,1 0,40 a20,20 0 1,1 0,-40
         m0,-15 a35,35 0 1,1 0,70 a35,35 0 1,1 0,-70
         m0,-15 a50,50 0 1,1 0,100 a50,50 0 1,1 0,-100
         m0,-15 a65,65 0 1,1 0,130 a65,65 0 1,1 0,-130
         m0,-15 a80,80 0 1,1 0,160 a80,80 0 1,1 0,-160"
      fill="none"
      stroke-linecap="round"
      stroke-linejoin="round"
    />
  </g>
</svg>

<style>
.spiral-group {
  transform-origin: 150px 150px;
  animation: spiralRotate 3s linear infinite;
}

@keyframes spiralRotate {
  from { transform: rotate(0deg); }
  to   { transform: rotate(360deg); }
}

.spiral-path {
  stroke-width: 3;
  animation: spiralStroke 3s linear infinite, spiralDash 3s ease-in-out infinite, spiralRadius 3s ease-in-out infinite;
}

@keyframes spiralStroke {
  0%   { stroke: #1166ff; }
  30%  { stroke: #00ccbb; }
  60%  { stroke: #ffaa22; }
  80%  { stroke: #ff6600; }
  100% { stroke: #1166ff; }
}

@keyframes spiralDash {
  /* 4-phase: 80ms-fast, 40ms-slow, 80ms-fast, 60ms-medium mapped proportionately across 3s */
  0%    { stroke-dasharray: 40 10;  stroke-dashoffset: 0; }
  30%   { stroke-dasharray: 6 22;   stroke-dashoffset: -80; }
  55%   { stroke-dasharray: 40 10;  stroke-dashoffset: -160; }
  80%   { stroke-dasharray: 20 16;  stroke-dashoffset: -240; }
  100%  { stroke-dasharray: 40 10;  stroke-dashoffset: -320; }
}

@keyframes spiralRadius {
  0%   { stroke-width: 3;   stroke-linecap: butt; }
  25%  { stroke-width: 4.5; stroke-linecap: round; }
  50%  { stroke-width: 3;   stroke-linecap: butt; }
  75%  { stroke-width: 4.5; stroke-linecap: round; }
  100% { stroke-width: 3;   stroke-linecap: butt; }
}

.spiral-shadow {
  animation: shadowPulse 3s ease-in-out infinite;
  transform-origin: 150px 150px;
}

@keyframes shadowPulse {
  0%   { transform: scale(0.6);  opacity: 0.5; }
  25%  { transform: scale(1.0);  opacity: 0.3; }
  50%  { transform: scale(1.2);  opacity: 0.15; }
  75%  { transform: scale(1.0);  opacity: 0.3; }
  100% { transform: scale(0.6);  opacity: 0.5; }
}
</style>

An unfurling spiral expanding outward from center while rotating clockwise continuously, its stroke-dasharray accelerates then decelerates in breathing four-phase rhythm, stroke-color gradually shifts from cool blue through turquoise to warm orange across three-second loop, the spiral's border-radius at curve intersections morphs from sharp to gently rounded creating organic flow, and a concentric shadow radiates and contracts suggesting helical depth.

<svg viewBox="0 0 300 300" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="300" height="300">
  <defs>
    <filter id="shadow1">
      <feDropShadow dx="0" dy="0" stdDeviation="8" flood-color="#0af" flood-opacity="0.6"/>
    </filter>
    <filter id="shadow2">
      <feDropShadow dx="0" dy="0" stdDeviation="4" flood-color="#0fa" flood-opacity="0.4"/>
    </filter>
  </defs>
  <g class="spiral-group">
    <path class="spiral s1" d="M150,150 m0,-10 a10,10 0 1,1 -0.01,0"/>
    <path class="spiral s2" d="M150,150 m0,-22 a22,22 0 1,1 -0.01,0"/>
    <path class="spiral s3" d="M150,150 m0,-38 a38,38 0 1,1 -0.01,0"/>
    <path class="spiral s4" d="M150,150 m0,-56 a56,56 0 1,1 -0.01,0"/>
    <path class="spiral s5" d="M150,150 m0,-76 a76,76 0 1,1 -0.01,0"/>
    <path class="spiral s6" d="M150,150 m0,-98 a98,98 0 1,1 -0.01,0"/>
    <path class="spiral s7" d="M150,150 m0,-120 a120,120 0 1,1 -0.01,0"/>
  </g>
</svg>
<style>
.spiral-group {
  transform-origin: 150px 150px;
  animation: spin-group 3s linear infinite;
}
@keyframes spin-group {
  from { transform: rotate(0deg); }
  to   { transform: rotate(360deg); }
}
.spiral {
  fill: none;
  stroke-linecap: round;
  stroke-linejoin: round;
  filter: url(#shadow1);
}
.s1 { stroke-width: 3; stroke-dasharray: 63;  animation: breathe 3s ease-in-out infinite, colorshift 3s linear infinite, dash1 3s ease-in-out infinite; }
.s2 { stroke-width: 3; stroke-dasharray: 138; animation: breathe 3s ease-in-out infinite 0.1s, colorshift 3s linear infinite 0.1s, dash2 3s ease-in-out infinite 0.1s; }
.s3 { stroke-width: 2.8; stroke-dasharray: 239; animation: breathe 3s ease-in-out infinite 0.2s, colorshift 3s linear infinite 0.2s, dash3 3s ease-in-out infinite 0.2s; }
.s4 { stroke-width: 2.5; stroke-dasharray: 352; animation: breathe 3s ease-in-out infinite 0.35s, colorshift 3s linear infinite 0.35s, dash4 3s ease-in-out infinite 0.35s; }
.s5 { stroke-width: 2; stroke-dasharray: 478; animation: breathe 3s ease-in-out infinite 0.5s, colorshift 3s linear infinite 0.5s, dash5 3s ease-in-out infinite 0.5s; }
.s6 { stroke-width: 1.6; stroke-dasharray: 616; animation: breathe 3s ease-in-out infinite 0.65s, colorshift 3s linear infinite 0.65s, dash6 3s ease-in-out infinite 0.65s; filter: url(#shadow2); }
.s7 { stroke-width: 1.2; stroke-dasharray: 754; animation: breathe 3s ease-in-out infinite 0.8s, colorshift 3s linear infinite 0.8s, dash7 3s ease-in-out infinite 0.8s; filter: url(#shadow2); }

@keyframes breathe {

  50%  { opacity: 0.8; }

}
@keyframes colorshift {

A paper airplane translating upward along a curved arc while rotating on three axes, its fuselage stroke-dasharray animates as if wind-peeling the outline backward with 150ms lag, the plane's clip-path narrows and widens simulating banking turns, the shadow stretches at sharp angles during turns then compresses, and background-position shifts creating wind-swept depth parallax.

Matrix-style falling glyphs translating downward in staggered columns, each glyph's stroke animates as a glowing outline brightening then dimming, glyph color shifts from bright green through muted tones suggesting digital decay, border-radius morphs from sharp to slightly rounded as opacity decreases, and background-position scrolls vertically creating depth parallax with staggered timing per column.

A morphing hexagon cycling through six distinct angular phases while rotating 360 degrees, border-radius on alternating vertices rounds from sharp to bulbous (0% to 30%) in staggered offsets, the stroke animates as a color gradient flowing around the perimeter in opposing directions, and an inner shadow intensifies at each transformation suggesting dimensional depth shifts and surface curvature.

<svg viewBox="0 0 300 300" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="300" height="300">
  <defs>
    <filter id="hex-glow">
      <feGaussianBlur stdDeviation="4" result="blur"/>
      <feMerge><feMergeNode in="blur"/><feMergeNode in="SourceGraphic"/></feMerge>
    </filter>
    <filter id="hex-inner">
      <feDropShadow dx="0" dy="0" stdDeviation="6" flood-color="#8844ff" flood-opacity="0.7"/>
    </filter>
    <linearGradient id="stroke-grad" x1="0%" y1="0%" x2="100%" y2="100%">
      <stop offset="0%" stop-color="#00ffcc">
        <animate attributeName="stop-color" values="#00ffcc;#ff44aa;#ffcc00;#00ffcc" dur="3s" repeatCount="indefinite"/>
      </stop>
      <stop offset="50%" stop-color="#ff44aa">
        <animate attributeName="stop-color" values="#ff44aa;#ffcc00;#00ffcc;#ff44aa" dur="3s" repeatCount="indefinite"/>
      </stop>
      <stop offset="100%" stop-color="#ffcc00">
        <animate attributeName="stop-color" values="#ffcc00;#00ffcc;#ff44aa;#ffcc00" dur="3s" repeatCount="indefinite"/>
      </stop>
    </linearGradient>
  </defs>
  <g class="hex-group">
    <polygon class="hex-shape" points="150,60 225,97.5 225,172.5 150,210 75,172.5 75,97.5"/>
    <polygon class="hex-inner-shape" points="150,80 210,112 210,176 150,208 90,176 90,112"/>
  </g>
</svg>
<style>
.hex-group {
  transform-origin: 150px 135px;
  animation: hex-rotate 3s linear infinite;
  filter: url(#hex-glow);
}
@keyframes hex-rotate {
  from { transform: rotate(0deg); }
  to   { transform: rotate(360deg); }
}
.hex-shape {
  fill: rgba(20,0,40,0.85);
  stroke: url(#stroke-grad);
  stroke-width: 3;
  stroke-linejoin: round;
  animation:
    hex-morph 3s ease-in-out infinite,
    hex-dash 3s ease-in-out infinite,
    hex-shadow 3s ease-in-out infinite;

}
@keyframes hex-morph {
  0%   { points: 150,60 225,97.5 225,172.5 150,210 75,172.5 75,97.5; rx: 0; }
  16%  { points: 150,55 228,95 230,175 150,215 70,175 72,95; }
  33%  { points: 148,58 226,100 228,170 152,212 74,170 70,100; }
  50%  { points: 150,60 225,97.5 225,172.5 150,210 75,172.5 75,97.5; }
  66%  { points: 152,62 223,95 223,175 148,208 77,175 77,95; }
  83%  { points: 150,65 220,100 220,170 150,205 80,170 80,100; }
  100% { points: 150,60 225,97.5 225,172.5 150,210 75,172.5 75,97.5; }
}
@keyframes hex-dash {
  0%   { stroke-dasharray: 50 10 30 20; stroke-dashoffset: 0; }
  25%  { stroke-dasharray: 80 5 20 15; stroke-dashoffset: -60; }
  50%  { stroke-dasharray: 40 20 50 10; stroke-dashoffset: -130; }
  75%  { stroke-dasharray: 70 10 25 15; stroke-dashoffset: -200; }
  100% { stroke-dasharray: 50 10 30 20; stroke-dashoffset: -280; }
}
@keyframes hex-shadow {

  33%  { filter: drop-shadow(0 0 14px #ff44aa) drop-shadow(0 0 28px #ff44aa88); }
  66%  { filter: drop-shadow(0 0 10px #ffcc00) drop-shadow(0 0 20px #ffcc0066); }
  100% { filter: url(#hex-inner) drop-shadow(0 0 4px #00ffcc); }
}
.hex-inner-shape {
  fill: none;
  stroke: rgba(180,100,255,0.4);
  stroke-width: 1;
  stroke-dasharray: 40 20;
  animation:
    hex-inner-dash 3s ease-in-out infinite reverse,
    hex-inner-morph 3s ease-in-out infinite 0.5s;
}
@keyframes hex-inner-dash {
  0%   { stroke-dashoffset: 0; stroke-opacity: 0.3; }

@keyframes hex-inner-morph {

}
</style>

A spinning aperture iris where four concentric rings rotate in opposite directions while counter-scaling, each ring's stroke-dasharray animates in opposing directions at staggered speeds, stroke-color sequences through cyan-magenta-yellow gradient pairs, inner shadows alternate between sharp and soft focus in sync with border-radius morphing, and the central clip-path creates pulsing aperture effect.

<svg viewBox="0 0 300 300" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="300" height="300">
  <defs>
    <filter id="iris-blur-soft">
      <feGaussianBlur stdDeviation="3" result="b"/>
      <feMerge><feMergeNode in="b"/><feMergeNode in="SourceGraphic"/></feMerge>
    </filter>
    <filter id="iris-blur-sharp">
      <feGaussianBlur stdDeviation="1"/>
    </filter>
    <radialGradient id="iris-bg" cx="50%" cy="50%" r="50%">
      <stop offset="0%" stop-color="#050510"/>
      <stop offset="100%" stop-color="#0a0520"/>
    </radialGradient>
    <clipPath id="aperture-clip">
      <circle class="aperture-circle" cx="150" cy="150" r="40"/>
    </clipPath>
  </defs>
  <rect width="300" height="300" fill="url(#iris-bg)"/>

  <!-- Ring 4 - outermost -->
  <circle class="ring r4" cx="150" cy="150" r="120"/>
  <!-- Ring 3 -->
  <circle class="ring r3" cx="150" cy="150" r="90"/>
  <!-- Ring 2 -->
  <circle class="ring r2" cx="150" cy="150" r="63"/>
  <!-- Ring 1 - innermost -->
  <circle class="ring r1" cx="150" cy="150" r="40"/>

  <!-- Aperture blades -->
  <g class="aperture-group">
    <ellipse class="blade b1" cx="150" cy="150" rx="38" ry="12"/>
    <ellipse class="blade b2" cx="150" cy="150" rx="38" ry="12"/>
    <ellipse class="blade b3" cx="150" cy="150" rx="38" ry="12"/>
    <ellipse class="blade b4" cx="150" cy="150" rx="38" ry="12"/>
  </g>

  <!-- Central lens -->
  <circle class="lens-center" cx="150" cy="150" r="18"/>
</svg>
<style>
/* Ring animations - alternating rotation directions and counter-scaling */
.ring {
  fill: none;
  stroke-width: 4;
}
.r4 {
  stroke: #00ffff;
  stroke-dasharray: 50 25 30 15 40 20;
  animation:
    ring-rot-cw 4s linear infinite,
    ring4-dash 4s ease-in-out infinite,
    ring4-color 6s ease-in-out infinite,
    ring4-scale 4s ease-in-out infinite;
  transform-origin: 150px 150px;
  filter: url(#iris-blur-soft);
}
@keyframes ring-rot-cw {
  from { transform: rotate(0deg) scale(1); }
  to   { transform: rotate(360deg) scale(1); }
}
@keyframes ring4-dash {
  0%   { stroke-dasharray: 50 25 30 15 40 20; stroke-dashoffset: 0; stroke-width: 4; }
  25%  { stroke-dasharray: 80 10 20 20 60 10; stroke-dashoffset: -80; stroke-width: 3; }
  50%  { stroke-dasharray: 40 35 50 5 30 30; stroke-dashoffset: -160; stroke-width: 5; }
  75%  { stroke-dasharray: 70 15 35 15 45 15; stroke-dashoffset: -240; stroke-width: 3.5; }
  100% { stroke-dasharray: 50 25 30 15 40 20; stroke-dashoffset: -380; stroke-width: 4; }
}
@keyframes ring4-color {
  0%   { stroke: #00ffff; }
  33%  { stroke: #ff00ff; }
  66%  { stroke: #ffff00; }
  100% { stroke: #00ffff; }
}
@keyframes ring4-scale {
  0%   { transform: rotate(0deg) scale(1); }
  50%  { transform: rotate(180deg) scale(1.05); }
  100% { transform: rotate(360deg) scale(1); }
}

.r3 {
  stroke: #ff00ff;
  stroke-dasharray: 45 20 25 20;
  animation:
    ring3-rot 3s linear infinite,
    ring3-dash 3s ease-in-out infinite,
    ring3-color 6s ease-in-out infinite 1s,
    ring3-scale 3s ease-in-out infinite;
  transform-origin: 150px 150px;
  filter: url(#iris-blur-soft);
}
@keyframes ring3-rot {
  from { transform: rotate(0deg) scale(1); }
  to   { transform: rotate(-360deg) scale(1); }
}
@keyframes ring3-dash {
  0%   { stroke-dasharray: 45 20 25 20; stroke-dashoffset: 0; stroke-width: 5; }
  25%  { stroke-dasharray: 75 8 15 25; stroke-dashoffset: 60; stroke-width: 3; }
  50%  { stroke-dasharray: 35 30 40 10; stroke-dashoffset: 130; stroke-width: 6; }
  75%  { stroke-dasharray: 60 12 30 20; stroke-dashoffset: 195; stroke-width: 3.5; }
  100% { stroke-dasharray: 45 20 25 20; stroke-dashoffset: 283; stroke-width: 5; }
}
@keyframes ring3-color {
  0%   { stroke: #ff00ff; }
  33%  { stroke: #ffff00; }
  66%  { stroke: #00ffff; }
  100% { stroke: #ff00ff; }
}
@keyframes ring3-scale {
  0%   { transform: rotate(0deg) scale(1.05); }
  50%  { transform: rotate(-180deg) scale(0.95); }
  100% { transform: rotate(-360deg) scale(1.05); }
}

.r2 {
  stroke: #ffff00;
  stroke-dasharray: 35 15 20 15;
  animation:
    ring2-rot 2.5s linear infinite,
    ring2-dash 2.5s ease-in-out infinite,
    ring2-color 6s ease-in-out infinite 2s,
    ring2-scale 2.5s ease-in-out infinite;
  transform-origin: 150px 150px;
}
@keyframes ring2-rot {
  from { transform: rotate(0deg) scale(1); }
  to   { transform: rotate(360deg) scale(1); }
}
@keyframes ring2-dash {
  0%   { stroke-dasharray: 35 15 20 15; stroke-dashoffset: 0; stroke-width: 5.5; }
  25%  { stroke-dasharray: 55 6 12 18; stroke-dashoffset: -45; stroke-width: 3; }
  50%  { stroke-dasharray: 25 25 35 7; stroke-dashoffset: -90; stroke-width: 7; }
  75%  { stroke-dasharray: 48 10 22 16; stroke-dashoffset: -135; stroke-width: 4; }
  100% { stroke-dasharray: 35 15 20 15; stroke-dashoffset: -198; stroke-width: 5.5; }
}
@keyframes ring2-color {
  0%   { stroke: #ffff00; }
  33%  { stroke: #00ffff; }
  66%  { stroke: #ff00ff; }
  100% { stroke: #ffff00; }
}
@keyframes ring2-scale {
  0%   { transform: rotate(0deg) scale(0.95); }
  50%  { transform: rotate(180deg) scale(1.08); }
  100% { transform: rotate(360deg) scale(0.95); }
}

.r1 {
  stroke: #00ffff;
  stroke-dasharray: 25 10 15 10;
  animation:
    ring1-rot 2s linear infinite,
    ring1-dash 2s ease-in-out infinite,
    ring1-color 6s ease-in-out infinite 0.5s,
    ring1-scale 2s ease-in-out infinite;
  transform-origin: 150px 150px;
  filter: url(#iris-blur-soft);
}
@keyframes ring1-rot {
  from { transform: rotate(0deg) scale(1); }
  to   { transform: rotate(-360deg) scale(1); }
}
@keyframes ring1-dash {
  0%   { stroke-dasharray: 25 10 15 10; stroke-dashoffset: 0; stroke-width: 6; border-radius: 0; }
  25%  { stroke-dasharray: 40 5 8 12; stroke-dashoffset: 30; stroke-width: 3; }
  50%  { stroke-dasharray: 18 18 25 5; stroke-dashoffset: 63; stroke-width: 8; }
  75%  { stroke-dasharray: 35 7 18 12; stroke-dashoffset: 94; stroke-width: 3.5; }
  100% { stroke-dasharray: 25 10 15 10; stroke-dashoffset: 126; stroke-width: 6; }
}
@keyframes ring1-color {
  0%   { stroke: #00ffff; }
  33%  { stroke: #ff00ff; }
  66%  { stroke: #ffff00; }
  100% { stroke: #00ffff; }
}
@keyframes ring1-scale {
  0%   { transform: rotate(0deg) scale(1.1); }
  50%  { transform: rotate(-180deg) scale(0.9); }
  100% { transform: rotate(-360deg) scale(1.1); }
}

/* Aperture blades */
.aperture-group {
  transform-origin: 150px 150px;
  animation: aperture-spin 5s linear infinite;
}
@keyframes aperture-spin {
  from { transform: rotate(0deg); }
  to   { transform: rotate(360deg); }
}
.blade {
  fill: rgba(0,0,20,0.85);
  stroke: none;
  transform-origin: 150px 150px;
}
.b1 { animation: blade-pulse 2.5s ease-in-out infinite; transform: rotate(0deg); }
.b2 { animation: blade-pulse 2.5s ease-in-out infinite 0.625s; transform: rotate(45deg); }
.b3 { animation: blade-pulse 2.5s ease-in-out infinite 1.25s; transform: rotate(90deg); }
.b4 { animation: blade-pulse 2.5s ease-in-out infinite 1.875s; transform: rotate(135deg); }
@keyframes blade-pulse {
  0%   { rx: 38; ry: 12; opacity: 0.9; }
  25%  { rx: 32; ry: 18; opacity: 0.7; }
  50%  { rx: 40; ry: 8;  opacity: 0.95; }
  75%  { rx: 28; ry: 22; opacity: 0.6; }
  100% { rx: 38; ry: 12; opacity: 0.9; }
}

/* Central lens */
.lens-center {
  fill: radial-gradient(circle, #001133, #000010);
  fill: #000810;
  stroke: #4488ff;
  stroke-width: 2;
  animation: lens-pulse 2s ease-in-out infinite, lens-color 6s ease-in-out infinite;
  transform-origin: 150px 150px;
  filter: url(#iris-blur-soft);
}
@keyframes lens-pulse {
  0%   { r: 18; stroke-width: 2;   opacity: 0.8; transform: scale(1); }
  25%  { r: 14; stroke-width: 3.5; opacity: 1;   transform: scale(1.1); }
  50%  { r: 22; stroke-width: 1.5; opacity: 0.6; transform: scale(0.9); }
  75%  { r: 12; stroke-width: 4;   opacity: 1;   transform: scale(1.15); }
  100% { r: 18; stroke-width: 2;   opacity: 0.8; transform: scale(1); }
}
@keyframes lens-color {
  0%   { stroke: #4488ff; fill: #000810; }
  33%  { stroke: #ff44ff; fill: #100010; }
  66%  { stroke: #44ffaa; fill: #001008; }
  100% { stroke: #4488ff; fill: #000810; }
}
</style>

A morphing star that transforms from sharp points to rounded lobes by cycling border-radius, the stroke animates as a gradient that flows around the perimeter, stroke-color shifts from gold through silver, the shadow beneath intensifies as border-radius increases, and the entire shape scales in and out.

<svg viewBox="-60 -60 120 120" width="300" height="300" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg">
  <defs>
    <filter id="shadow1">
      <feDropShadow dx="0" dy="0" stdDeviation="4" flood-color="rgba(0,0,0,0.6)" result="s"/>
    </filter>
    <linearGradient id="strokeGrad" x1="0%" y1="0%" x2="100%" y2="100%" gradientUnits="userSpaceOnUse">
      <stop offset="0%" stop-color="#FFD700">
        <animate attributeName="stop-color" values="#FFD700;#C0C0C0;#FFD700" dur="3s" repeatCount="indefinite"/>
      </stop>
      <stop offset="50%" stop-color="#C0C0C0">
        <animate attributeName="stop-color" values="#C0C0C0;#FFD700;#C0C0C0" dur="3s" repeatCount="indefinite"/>
      </stop>
      <stop offset="100%" stop-color="#FFD700">
        <animate attributeName="stop-color" values="#FFD700;#C0C0C0;#FFD700" dur="3s" repeatCount="indefinite"/>
      </stop>
    </linearGradient>
    <linearGradient id="strokeGrad2" x1="100%" y1="0%" x2="0%" y2="100%" gradientUnits="userSpaceOnUse">
      <stop offset="0%" stop-color="#FFF8DC">
        <animate attributeName="stop-color" values="#FFF8DC;#E8E8E8;#FFF8DC" dur="3s" repeatCount="indefinite"/>
      </stop>
      <stop offset="100%" stop-color="#DAA520">
        <animate attributeName="stop-color" values="#DAA520;#A9A9A9;#DAA520" dur="3s" repeatCount="indefinite"/>
      </stop>
    </linearGradient>
  </defs>
  <g class="star-group">
    <path class="star-path" d="M0,-45 L10,-15 L40,-30 L20,0 L40,30 L10,15 L0,45 L-10,15 L-40,30 L-20,0 L-40,-30 L-10,-15 Z" fill="url(#strokeGrad)" stroke="url(#strokeGrad2)" stroke-width="2" filter="url(#shadow1)"/>
  </g>
</svg>

<style>

}

}

  25%  { d: path("M0,-42 C6,-14 14,-14 38,-26 C18,2 18,2 38,26 C14,14 6,14 0,42 C-6,14 -14,14 -38,26 C-18,2 -18,2 -38,-26 C-14,-14 -6,-14 0,-42 Z"); }
  50%  { d: path("M0,-38 C12,-12 12,-12 36,-22 C16,4 16,4 36,22 C12,12 12,12 0,38 C-12,12 -12,12 -36,22 C-16,4 -16,4 -36,-22 C-12,-12 -12,-12 0,-38 Z"); filter: drop-shadow(0 8px 12px rgba(0,0,0,0.7)); }
  75%  { d: path("M0,-42 C6,-14 14,-14 38,-26 C18,2 18,2 38,26 C14,14 6,14 0,42 C-6,14 -14,14 -38,26 C-18,2 -18,2 -38,-26 C-14,-14 -6,-14 0,-42 Z"); }
  100% { d: path("M0,-45 L10,-15 L40,-30 L20,0 L40,30 L10,15 L0,45 L-10,15 L-40,30 L-20,0 L-40,-30 L-10,-15 Z"); filter: drop-shadow(0 4px 4px rgba(0,0,0,0.3)); }

A kaleidoscopic pattern where six wedges rotate clockwise while each wedge skews inward toward center in staggered offsets, each wedge's stroke-width pulsates to the rotation beat, stroke-color sequences through rainbow spectrum, and the center clips a rotating mask with morphing border-radius.

<svg viewBox="0 0 300 300" width="300" height="300" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg">
  <defs>
    <clipPath id="centerClip">
      <rect id="clipRect" x="120" y="120" width="60" height="60" rx="10" ry="10">
        <animate attributeName="rx" values="10;30;10" dur="2s" repeatCount="indefinite"/>
        <animate attributeName="ry" values="10;30;10" dur="2s" repeatCount="indefinite"/>
        <animateTransform attributeName="transform" type="rotate" from="0 150 150" to="360 150 150" dur="2s" repeatCount="indefinite"/>
      </rect>
    </clipPath>
    <mask id="centerMask">
      <rect x="0" y="0" width="300" height="300" fill="white"/>
      <rect x="120" y="120" width="60" height="60" rx="10" ry="10" fill="black">
        <animate attributeName="rx" values="10;30;10" dur="2s" repeatCount="indefinite"/>
        <animate attributeName="ry" values="10;30;10" dur="2s" repeatCount="indefinite"/>
        <animateTransform attributeName="transform" type="rotate" from="0 150 150" to="360 150 150" dur="2s" repeatCount="indefinite"/>
      </rect>
    </mask>
  </defs>

  <g mask="url(#centerMask)">
    <!-- 6 wedges, each 60 degrees -->
    <g class="wedge w1">
      <path d="M150,150 L150,50 A100,100 0 0,1 236.6,100 Z" fill="rgba(255,50,50,0.7)" stroke="#ff3232" stroke-width="2">
        <animate attributeName="stroke" values="#ff0000;#ff9900;#ffff00;#00ff00;#0099ff;#cc00ff;#ff0000" dur="4s" repeatCount="indefinite"/>
        <animate attributeName="stroke-width" values="2;5;2" dur="1.33s" repeatCount="indefinite"/>
      </path>
    </g>
    <g class="wedge w2">
      <path d="M150,150 L236.6,100 A100,100 0 0,1 236.6,200 Z" fill="rgba(255,165,0,0.7)" stroke="#ff9900" stroke-width="2">
        <animate attributeName="stroke" values="#ff9900;#ffff00;#00ff00;#0099ff;#cc00ff;#ff0000;#ff9900" dur="4s" repeatCount="indefinite"/>
        <animate attributeName="stroke-width" values="2;5;2" dur="1.33s" begin="0.22s" repeatCount="indefinite"/>
      </path>
    </g>
    <g class="wedge w3">
      <path d="M150,150 L236.6,200 A100,100 0 0,1 150,250 Z" fill="rgba(255,255,0,0.7)" stroke="#ffff00" stroke-width="2">
        <animate attributeName="stroke" values="#ffff00;#00ff00;#0099ff;#cc00ff;#ff0000;#ff9900;#ffff00" dur="4s" repeatCount="indefinite"/>
        <animate attributeName="stroke-width" values="2;5;2" dur="1.33s" begin="0.44s" repeatCount="indefinite"/>
      </path>
    </g>
    <g class="wedge w4">
      <path d="M150,150 L150,250 A100,100 0 0,1 63.4,200 Z" fill="rgba(0,200,0,0.7)" stroke="#00cc00" stroke-width="2">
        <animate attributeName="stroke" values="#00ff00;#0099ff;#cc00ff;#ff0000;#ff9900;#ffff00;#00ff00" dur="4s" repeatCount="indefinite"/>
        <animate attributeName="stroke-width" values="2;5;2" dur="1.33s" begin="0.66s" repeatCount="indefinite"/>
      </path>
    </g>
    <g class="wedge w5">
      <path d="M150,150 L63.4,200 A100,100 0 0,1 63.4,100 Z" fill="rgba(0,100,255,0.7)" stroke="#0066ff" stroke-width="2">
        <animate attributeName="stroke" values="#0099ff;#cc00ff;#ff0000;#ff9900;#ffff00;#00ff00;#0099ff" dur="4s" repeatCount="indefinite"/>
        <animate attributeName="stroke-width" values="2;5;2" dur="1.33s" begin="0.88s" repeatCount="indefinite"/>
      </path>
    </g>
    <g class="wedge w6">
      <path d="M150,150 L63.4,100 A100,100 0 0,1 150,50 Z" fill="rgba(180,0,255,0.7)" stroke="#cc00ff" stroke-width="2">
        <animate attributeName="stroke" values="#cc00ff;#ff0000;#ff9900;#ffff00;#00ff00;#0099ff;#cc00ff" dur="4s" repeatCount="indefinite"/>
        <animate attributeName="stroke-width" values="2;5;2" dur="1.33s" begin="1.1s" repeatCount="indefinite"/>
      </path>
    </g>
  </g>
</svg>

<style>
.w1 { animation: wedgeRotate 4s linear infinite; transform-origin: 150px 150px; }
.w2 { animation: wedgeRotate 4s linear infinite; transform-origin: 150px 150px; animation-delay: -0.11s; }
.w3 { animation: wedgeRotate 4s linear infinite; transform-origin: 150px 150px; animation-delay: -0.22s; }
.w4 { animation: wedgeRotate 4s linear infinite; transform-origin: 150px 150px; animation-delay: -0.33s; }

@keyframes wedgeRotate {
  0%   { transform: rotate(0deg) skewX(0deg); }
  25%  { transform: rotate(90deg) skewX(-8deg); }
  50%  { transform: rotate(180deg) skewX(0deg); }
  75%  { transform: rotate(270deg) skewX(8deg); }
  100% { transform: rotate(360deg) skewX(0deg); }

</style>

A kaleidoscope pattern where twelve triangular wedges rotate clockwise while skewing on alternating axes in a 360-degree spin, each wedge's stroke-width pulsates to a four-beat rhythm, stroke-color sequences through rainbow gradient with staggered offsets, the center clips a rotating mask with morphing border-radius, and layered shadows cast at varying opacity.

<svg viewBox="0 0 300 300" width="300" height="300" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg">
