A web of interconnected nodes where clip-path on connecting lines creates dashing reveals while rotating bidirectionally, each line's stroke-color transitions cool-blue-to-warm-orange, stroke-width modulates along path suggesting flow direction, and layered shadows beneath create three-dimensional thread depth.

<svg viewBox="0 0 300 300" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" class="web-svg">
  <defs>
    <filter id="shadow1" x="-50%" y="-50%" width="200%" height="200%">
      <feDropShadow dx="0" dy="3" stdDeviation="4" flood-color="rgba(0,80,180,0.5)"/>
    </filter>
    <filter id="shadow2" x="-50%" y="-50%" width="200%" height="200%">
      <feDropShadow dx="0" dy="5" stdDeviation="7" flood-color="rgba(0,40,120,0.35)"/>
    </filter>
    <filter id="glow" x="-50%" y="-50%" width="200%" height="200%">
      <feGaussianBlur stdDeviation="2.5" result="blur"/>
      <feMerge><feMergeNode in="blur"/><feMergeNode in="SourceGraphic"/></feMerge>
    </filter>

    <!-- Node glow -->
    <radialGradient id="nodeGrad" cx="50%" cy="30%" r="60%">
      <stop offset="0%" stop-color="#aef"/>
      <stop offset="100%" stop-color="#0055cc"/>
    </radialGradient>

    <!-- Clip paths for lines (each covering respective path bbox roughly) -->
    <clipPath id="clip1"><rect x="0" y="0" width="300" height="300"/></clipPath>
    <clipPath id="clip2"><rect x="0" y="0" width="300" height="300"/></clipPath>
  </defs>

  <!-- Deep shadow layer (offset, blurred) -->
  <g class="shadow-layer" filter="url(#shadow2)" opacity="0.5">
    <!-- Lines shadow set -->
    <line class="sl" x1="150" y1="50"  x2="260" y2="130"/>
    <line class="sl" x1="150" y1="50"  x2="220" y2="240"/>
    <line class="sl" x1="150" y1="50"  x2="80"  y2="240"/>
    <line class="sl" x1="150" y1="50"  x2="40"  y2="130"/>
    <line class="sl" x1="260" y1="130" x2="220" y2="240"/>
    <line class="sl" x1="220" y1="240" x2="80"  y2="240"/>
    <line class="sl" x1="80"  y1="240" x2="40"  y2="130"/>
    <line class="sl" x1="40"  y1="130" x2="260" y2="130"/>
    <line class="sl" x1="150" y1="50"  x2="150" y2="170"/>
    <line class="sl" x1="260" y1="130" x2="150" y2="170"/>
    <line class="sl" x1="220" y1="240" x2="150" y2="170"/>
    <line class="sl" x1="80"  y1="240" x2="150" y2="170"/>
    <line class="sl" x1="40"  y1="130" x2="150" y2="170"/>
  </g>

  <!-- Rotating group (bidirectional via nested) -->
  <g class="rotate-cw" style="transform-origin:150px 150px">
    <g class="rotate-ccw-inner" style="transform-origin:150px 150px">

      <!-- Line 1: node0-node1 -->
      <line class="web-line l1" x1="150" y1="50"  x2="260" y2="130" filter="url(#shadow1)"/>
      <!-- Line 2: node0-node2 -->
      <line class="web-line l2" x1="150" y1="50"  x2="220" y2="240" filter="url(#shadow1)"/>
      <!-- Line 3: node0-node3 -->
      <line class="web-line l3" x1="150" y1="50"  x2="80"  y2="240" filter="url(#shadow1)"/>
      <!-- Line 4: node0-node4 -->
      <line class="web-line l4" x1="150" y1="50"  x2="40"  y2="130" filter="url(#shadow1)"/>
      <!-- Line 5: node1-node2 -->
      <line class="web-line l5" x1="260" y1="130" x2="220" y2="240" filter="url(#shadow1)"/>
      <!-- Line 6: node2-node3 -->
      <line class="web-line l6" x1="220" y1="240" x2="80"  y2="240" filter="url(#shadow1)"/>
      <!-- Line 7: node3-node4 -->
      <line class="web-line l7" x1="80"  y1="240" x2="40"  y2="130" filter="url(#shadow1)"/>
      <!-- Line 8: node4-node1 -->
      <line class="web-line l8" x1="40"  y1="130" x2="260" y2="130" filter="url(#shadow1)"/>
      <!-- Inner lines to center node5 -->
      <line class="web-line l9"  x1="150" y1="50"  x2="150" y2="170" filter="url(#shadow1)"/>
      <line class="web-line l10" x1="260" y1="130" x2="150" y2="170" filter="url(#shadow1)"/>
      <line class="web-line l11" x1="220" y1="240" x2="150" y2="170" filter="url(#shadow1)"/>
      <line class="web-line l12" x1="80"  y1="240" x2="150" y2="170" filter="url(#shadow1)"/>
      <line class="web-line l13" x1="40"  y1="130" x2="150" y2="170" filter="url(#shadow1)"/>

      <!-- Nodes -->
      <circle class="node n0" cx="150" cy="50"  r="9" filter="url(#glow)"/>
      <circle class="node n1" cx="260" cy="130" r="9" filter="url(#glow)"/>
      <circle class="node n2" cx="220" cy="240" r="9" filter="url(#glow)"/>
      <circle class="node n3" cx="80"  cy="240" r="9" filter="url(#glow)"/>
      <circle class="node n4" cx="40"  cy="130" r="9" filter="url(#glow)"/>
      <circle class="node n5" cx="150" cy="170" r="11" filter="url(#glow)"/>
    </g>
  </g>
</svg>

<style>
.web-svg {
  width: 300px;
  height: 300px;
  display: block;
}

/* Shadow lines style */
.sl {
  stroke: #003388;
  stroke-width: 4;
  stroke-linecap: round;
  opacity: 0.4;
}

/* Web lines base */
.web-line {
  stroke-linecap: round;
  fill: none;
  stroke-width: 3;
}

/* Per-line color + dasharray animation */
.l1  { stroke-dasharray: 140; animation: dash1 2.8s ease-in-out infinite, colorshift 4s ease-in-out infinite, widthpulse 2.8s ease-in-out infinite; }
.l2  { stroke-dasharray: 210; animation: dash2 3.1s ease-in-out infinite, colorshift 4s 0.4s ease-in-out infinite, widthpulse 3.1s 0.2s ease-in-out infinite; }
.l3  { stroke-dasharray: 210; animation: dash3 3.4s ease-in-out infinite, colorshift 4s 0.8s ease-in-out infinite, widthpulse 3.4s 0.4s ease-in-out infinite; }
.l4  { stroke-dasharray: 140; animation: dash4 2.6s ease-in-out infinite, colorshift 4s 1.2s ease-in-out infinite, widthpulse 2.6s 0.6s ease-in-out infinite; }
.l5  { stroke-dasharray: 120; animation: dash5 2.5s ease-in-out infinite, colorshift 4s 1.6s ease-in-out infinite, widthpulse 2.5s 0.8s ease-in-out infinite; }
.l6  { stroke-dasharray: 140; animation: dash6 3.0s ease-in-out infinite, colorshift 4s 2.0s ease-in-out infinite, widthpulse 3.0s 1.0s ease-in-out infinite; }
.l7  { stroke-dasharray: 120; animation: dash7 2.7s ease-in-out infinite, colorshift 4s 2.4s ease-in-out infinite, widthpulse 2.7s 1.2s ease-in-out infinite; }
.l8  { stroke-dasharray: 220; animation: dash8 3.3s ease-in-out infinite, colorshift 4s 2.8s ease-in-out infinite, widthpulse 3.3s 1.4s ease-in-out infinite; }
.l9  { stroke-dasharray: 120; animation: dash9  2.4s ease-in-out infinite, colorshift 4s 0.6s ease-in-out infinite, widthpulse 2.4s 0.3s ease-in-out infinite; }
.l10 { stroke-dasharray: 125; animation: dash10 2.9s ease-in-out infinite, colorshift 4s 1.0s ease-in-out infinite, widthpulse 2.9s 0.5s ease-in-out infinite; }
.l11 { stroke-dasharray: 100; animation: dash11 2.6s ease-in-out infinite, colorshift 4s 1.4s ease-in-out infinite, widthpulse 2.6s 0.7s ease-in-out infinite; }
.l12 { stroke-dasharray: 100; animation: dash12 2.3s ease-in-out infinite, colorshift 4s 1.8s ease-in-out infinite, widthpulse 2.3s 0.9s ease-in-out infinite; }
.l13 { stroke-dasharray: 125; animation: dash13 3.2s ease-in-out infinite, colorshift 4s 2.2s ease-in-out infinite, widthpulse 3.2s 1.1s ease-in-out infinite; }

/* Dash keyframes — offset goes full length → 0 (reveal) → back */
@keyframes dash1  { 0%{stroke-dashoffset:140}  50%{stroke-dashoffset:0}   100%{stroke-dashoffset:-140} }
@keyframes dash2  { 0%{stroke-dashoffset:210}  50%{stroke-dashoffset:0}   100%{stroke-dashoffset:-210} }
@keyframes dash3  { 0%{stroke-dashoffset:-210} 50%{stroke-dashoffset:0}   100%{stroke-dashoffset:210}  }
@keyframes dash4  { 0%{stroke-dashoffset:140}  50%{stroke-dashoffset:0}   100%{stroke-dashoffset:-140} }
@keyframes dash5  { 0%{stroke-dashoffset:-120} 50%{stroke-dashoffset:0}   100%{stroke-dashoffset:120}  }
@keyframes dash6  { 0%{stroke-dashoffset:140}  50%{stroke-dashoffset:0}   100%{stroke-dashoffset:-140} }
@keyframes dash7  { 0%{stroke-dashoffset:-120} 50%{stroke-dashoffset:0}   100%{stroke-dashoffset:120}  }
@keyframes dash8  { 0%{stroke-dashoffset:220}  50%{stroke-dashoffset:0}   100%{stroke-dashoffset:-220} }
@keyframes dash9  { 0%{stroke-dashoffset:-120} 50%{stroke-dashoffset:0}   100%{stroke-dashoffset:120}  }
@keyframes dash10 { 0%{stroke-dashoffset:125}  50%{stroke-dashoffset:0}   100%{stroke-dashoffset:-125} }
@keyframes dash11 { 0%{stroke-dashoffset:-100} 50%{stroke-dashoffset:0}   100%{stroke-dashoffset:100}  }
@keyframes dash12 { 0%{stroke-dashoffset:100}  50%{stroke-dashoffset:0}   100%{stroke-dashoffset:-100} }
@keyframes dash13 { 0%{stroke-dashoffset:-125} 50%{stroke-dashoffset:0}   100%{stroke-dashoffset:125}  }

/* Color: cool blue → warm orange */
@keyframes colorshift {
  0%   { stroke: #1a88ff; }
  25%  { stroke: #00ccdd; }
  50%  { stroke: #ff9900; }
  75%  { stroke: #ff5533; }
  100% { stroke: #1a88ff; }
}

/* Width modulation — simulates flow direction */
@keyframes widthpulse {
  0%   { stroke-width: 1.5; }
  30%  { stroke-width: 4.5; }
  60%  { stroke-width: 1.5; }
  80%  { stroke-width: 3.5; }
  100% { stroke-width: 1.5; }
}

/* Nodes */
.node {
  fill: url(#nodeGrad);
  stroke: #aaddff;
  stroke-width: 1.5;
  animation: nodepulse 2s ease-in-out infinite;
}
.n0 { animation-delay: 0s; }
.n1 { animation-delay: 0.3s; }
.n2 { animation-delay: 0.6s; }
.n3 { animation-delay: 0.9s; }
.n4 { animation-delay: 1.2s; }
.n5 { animation-delay: 1.5s; }

@keyframes nodepulse {
  0%,100% { r: 9;  opacity: 0.9; }
  50%      { r: 11; opacity: 1;   }
}
.n5 {
  animation: nodepulse5 2s ease-in-out infinite;
}
@keyframes nodepulse5 {
  0%,100% { r: 11; opacity: 0.9; }
  50%      { r: 14; opacity: 1;   }
}

/* Bidirectional rotation: outer CW, inner CCW at different speeds */
.rotate-cw {
  animation: rotateCW 12s linear infinite;
}
.rotate-ccw-inner {
  animation: rotateCCW 8s linear infinite;
}

@keyframes rotateCW {
  from { transform: rotate(0deg); }
  to   { transform: rotate(360deg); }
}
@keyframes rotateCCW {
  from { transform: rotate(0deg); }
  to   { transform: rotate(-360deg); }
}
</style>

A paper plane that translates upward along a curved path while rotating on three axes, its fuselage stroke-dasharray animates as if wind is peeling the outline, the plane's clip-path narrows and widens to simulate banking turns, and the shadow beneath stretches at sharp angles then compresses, all timed across a five-phase flight sequence.

<svg width="300" height="300" viewBox="0 0 300 300" class="plane-wrap">
  <ellipse class="shadow" cx="150" cy="270" rx="40" ry="8" fill="#0004"/>
  <polygon class="plane" points="150,120 120,180 150,165 180,180" fill="#4a90d9" stroke="#fff" stroke-width="3"/>
</svg>
<style>
.plane {
  stroke-dasharray: 60;
  transform-origin: center;
  animation: fly 5s ease-in-out infinite, peel 5s linear infinite, bank 5s ease-in-out infinite;
}
@keyframes fly {
  0% { transform: translate(0,80px) rotateX(0) rotateY(0) rotateZ(0); }
  20% { transform: translate(-40px,40px) rotateX(20deg) rotateY(-15deg) rotateZ(-10deg); }
  40% { transform: translate(30px,0) rotateX(-15deg) rotateY(25deg) rotateZ(15deg); }
  60% { transform: translate(-25px,-30px) rotateX(25deg) rotateY(-20deg) rotateZ(-12deg); }
  80% { transform: translate(20px,-60px) rotateX(-10deg) rotateY(10deg) rotateZ(8deg); }
  100% { transform: translate(0,80px) rotateX(0) rotateY(0) rotateZ(0); }
}
@keyframes peel {
  0% { stroke-dashoffset: 0; }
  100% { stroke-dashoffset: 120; }
}
@keyframes bank {
  0%,100% { clip-path: inset(0 0 0 0); }
  25% { clip-path: inset(0 25% 0 0); }
  50% { clip-path: inset(0 0 0 0); }
  75% { clip-path: inset(0 0 0 25%); }
}
.shadow { animation: shad 5s ease-in-out infinite; }
@keyframes shad {
  0%,100% { transform: scaleX(1) skewX(0); opacity:.5; }
  20% { transform: scaleX(1.6) skewX(25deg); opacity:.3; }
  60% { transform: scaleX(0.6) skewX(-30deg); opacity:.6; }
  80% { transform: scaleX(1.3) skewX(15deg); opacity:.25; }
}
</style>

Three concentric parallelograms that skew in opposite directions while counter-rotating, each shape's stroke-dasharray animates in opposite directions at staggered speeds, stroke-color ripples through complementary gradient pairs, and shadows cast at opposing angles create a twisting vortex effect with staggered timing between shapes.

<svg width="300" height="300" viewBox="0 0 300 300">
  <polygon class="p p1" points="100,110 200,110 180,190 80,190" fill="none" stroke="#ff5f6d" stroke-width="4"/>
  <polygon class="p p2" points="115,125 185,125 170,175 100,175" fill="none" stroke="#36d1dc" stroke-width="4"/>
  <polygon class="p p3" points="130,140 170,140 160,160 120,160" fill="none" stroke="#ffd800" stroke-width="4"/>
</svg>
<style>
.p { transform-origin: 150px 150px; stroke-dasharray: 40; }
.p1 { animation: rot1 6s linear infinite, dash1 4s linear infinite, col1 5s ease-in-out infinite; filter: drop-shadow(6px 6px 4px #0006); }
.p2 { animation: rot2 6s linear infinite, dash2 3s linear infinite, col2 5s ease-in-out infinite -0.6s; filter: drop-shadow(-6px 6px 4px #0006); }
.p3 { animation: rot1 6s linear infinite -1.2s, dash1 2.5s linear infinite, col1 5s ease-in-out infinite -1.2s; filter: drop-shadow(6px -6px 4px #0006); }
@keyframes rot1 { 0% { transform: rotate(0) skewX(15deg);} 100%{ transform: rotate(360deg) skewX(15deg);} }
@keyframes rot2 { 0% { transform: rotate(0) skewX(-20deg);} 100%{ transform: rotate(-360deg) skewX(-20deg);} }
@keyframes dash1 { 0%{stroke-dashoffset:0;} 100%{stroke-dashoffset:80;} }
@keyframes dash2 { 0%{stroke-dashoffset:80;} 100%{stroke-dashoffset:0;} }
@keyframes col1 { 0%,100%{stroke:#ff5f6d;} 50%{stroke:#36d1dc;} }
@keyframes col2 { 0%,100%{stroke:#36d1dc;} 50%{stroke:#ff5f6d;} }
</style>

An orbiting particle system where eight particles scale outward from center while rotating rapidly, each particle's stroke-width modulates inversely with distance (thinner at center, fatter at edges), stroke-color gradient flows from cool blue core to warm red periphery in staggered ripples offset by 100ms, the particle's shadow stretches radially outward then contracts, and opacity fades from opaque to transparent across the expanding arc.

A morphing star that transforms through eight angular phases while rotating slowly (360 degrees per cycle), border-radius cycles from 0% razor-sharp points to 25% softly-rounded lobes in staggered phase offsets (each point offset by 45ms), the stroke animates as a color gradient flowing around the perimeter in opposing directions, and the shadow beneath intensifies as border-radius increases suggesting increased three-dimensional bulge.

A morphing star undergoing eight distinct phases while rotating slowly (360 degrees per full cycle), border-radius cycles from razor-sharp (0%) points to softly-rounded (25%) lobes offset by 45ms per phase, the stroke animates as a color gradient flowing around the perimeter in opposing directions every other rotation, and the shadow beneath intensifies as border-radius increases suggesting increased three-dimensional bulge and dimensionality.

A cascading confetti stream where twelve pieces translate downward at staggered speeds while their border-radius morphs from sharp corners to fully rounded mid-fall, each piece rotates on multiple axes, shadows stretch beneath each piece, and opacity fades from opaque to transparent creating a dimensional flutter effect with trailing shadow distortion.

An audio waveform visualization where eight vertical bars translate upward and downward at staggered 100ms intervals while their stroke-dasharray animates as glowing outlines, stroke-color ripples through a spectrum from cool blue through vibrant cyan to warm magenta in cascading waves, each bar's stroke-width modulates inversely with height (thin when tall, thick when short), and shadows beneath each bar stretch vertically then compress based on movement intensity.

A pulsating cellular membrane cycling border-radius from angular (10%) to bulbous (50%) while its stroke-dasharray animates as a wave accelerating through four tempo phases, stroke-color shifts from pale cyan to vibrant magenta and back in staggered 120ms cycles, the membrane's inner and outer shadows invert from cast-outward to cast-inward suggesting internal pressure, and the shape scales subtly in sync.

<svg class="cell" viewBox="0 0 200 200" width="220" height="220">
<rect class="membrane" x="40" y="40" width="120" height="120" fill="none" stroke-width="6"/>
</svg>
<style>
.cell { animation: cellScale 2.4s ease-in-out infinite; }
.membrane {
  stroke: #b0f0ff;
  stroke-dasharray: 10 20;
  animation: morph 2.4s ease-in-out infinite,
             wave 1.6s linear infinite,
             hue 0.96s ease-in-out infinite alternate,
             pressure 2.4s ease-in-out infinite;
  filter: drop-shadow(0 0 8px rgba(0,200,255,0.6));
}
@keyframes cellScale {
  0%,100% { transform: scale(0.95); }
  50% { transform: scale(1.05); }
}
@keyframes morph {
  0%,100% { rx: 20; ry: 20; }
  50% { rx: 60; ry: 60; }
}
@keyframes wave {
  0% { stroke-dasharray: 4 30; stroke-dashoffset: 0; }
  25% { stroke-dasharray: 12 18; }
  50% { stroke-dasharray: 25 10; }
  75% { stroke-dasharray: 12 18; }
  100% { stroke-dasharray: 4 30; stroke-dashoffset: -200; }
}
@keyframes hue {
  0% { stroke: #b0f0ff; }
  100% { stroke: #ff20d0; }
}
@keyframes pressure {
  0%,100% { filter: drop-shadow(0 0 10px rgba(0,220,255,0.7)); }
  50% { filter: drop-shadow(0 0 0 transparent) drop-shadow(inset 0 0 12px rgba(255,30,200,0.8)); }
}
</style>

A radial burst explosion where sixteen wedge-shaped clip-paths expand outward from center while rotating rapidly, each wedge's stroke-width scales inversely with distance suggesting perspective, stroke-color fades from bright white-yellow to transparent orange, and shadows stretch radially outward creating explosion depth.

A twisted ribbon unfurling where the stroke skews dramatically on sharp 45° angles while stroke-dasharray chases the entire length, stroke-width modulates from thin-to-thick creating tension, border-radius softens curve intersections, and color transitions gold-to-copper suggesting metallic twist.

<svg class="ribbon" viewBox="0 0 200 200" width="240" height="240">
<path class="band" d="M30,100 C60,40 100,160 130,100 S180,40 190,100" fill="none" stroke-linecap="round"/>
</svg>
<style>
.ribbon { animation: twist 4s ease-in-out infinite; }
.band {
  stroke: #ffd24d;
  stroke-width: 6;
  stroke-dasharray: 260;
  stroke-dashoffset: 260;
  stroke-linejoin: round;
  animation: chase 3s linear infinite,
             tension 1.8s ease-in-out infinite,
             metal 2.4s ease-in-out infinite alternate;
}
@keyframes twist {
  0%,100% { transform: skewX(0deg) skewY(0deg); }
  25% { transform: skewX(45deg) skewY(-10deg); }
  50% { transform: skewX(0deg) skewY(0deg); }
  75% { transform: skewX(-45deg) skewY(10deg); }
}
@keyframes chase {
  to { stroke-dashoffset: -260; }
}
@keyframes tension {
  0%,100% { stroke-width: 3; }
  50% { stroke-width: 14; }
}
@keyframes metal {
  0% { stroke: #ffd24d; filter: drop-shadow(0 0 4px rgba(255,200,80,0.6)); }
  100% { stroke: #b5651d; filter: drop-shadow(0 0 6px rgba(180,100,30,0.7)); }
}
</style>
